en.commentary:
The Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete earned the number one spot on the Vacuum Wars Top 20 this week, and I agree with that assessment. Its combination of a 3.13-inch retractable LiDAR profile — meaning it actually fits under most beds and sofas — 35,000 Pa suction, and threshold climbing up to 51mm addresses problems that previous generation robots either ignored or solved incompletely. The X60 Max Ultra Complete is available for preorder at $1,359.99, which puts it in direct competition with the Roborock Saros 10R and Saros 20.

Roborock's Saros 20 is the other major 2026 development worth noting. Its AdaptiLift Chassis 3.0 uses a tri-wheel legged system to clear thresholds up to 3.46 inches — a figure that beats the X60 Max Ultra Complete's 51mm. Suction at 36,000 Pa is stronger than the Dreame by a meaningful margin. The Saros 20 costs $1,599.99 and is shipping now, while the X60 Max Ultra is on preorder. Because Roborock Saros 20 is not yet in our competitors list for this ranking, I am keeping the Saros 10R at second until the Saros 20 can be evaluated against full testing data — but the Saros 20's specs suggest the second position will be contested.

The Dreame L50 Ultra holds third as the best mopping specialist on this list. Three months of real-world testing with heavy-shedding pets confirms the hands-off claim: the automated wash-and-dry mop cycle means debris in the mop pad is removed before it gets redistributed across your floors. For anyone with a mix of hard floors and area rugs, the L50 Ultra is worth the $800 price.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete earns the top spot through genuine problem-solving
highlights.body: 3.13 inches profile height means it clears most furniture obstacles without floor-level furniture risers. 35,000 Pa suction handles cat litter and debris from textured rugs that lower-powered robots scatter. Threshold climbing at 51mm lets it cross room barriers that force lower-clearance robots to stop. The $1,359.99 preorder price is competitive for what it delivers. Vacuum Wars awarded it the overall number one spot in their April 2026 Top 20 review.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 20 is about to challenge for the top position
highlights.body: The Saros 20 launched at $1,599.99 with 36,000 Pa suction and AdaptiLift Chassis 3.0 that clears 3.46-inch thresholds — more than any other robot vacuum currently shipping. The Saros 10R it replaces was already at the top of most 2026 rankings. Once the Saros 20 completes its first testing cycle across major review outlets, expect it to contest the first-place position. The Saros Z70's robotic arm for picking up objects like socks and cables remains a unique capability that no Dreame product currently matches.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra is the best real-world mopping performer at its price
highlights.body: The L50 Ultra's automated mop wash and hot-air dry cycle means the mop pad is clean at the start of each pass rather than dragging accumulated debris across your hard floors. Priced at $799.99 — down from $1,399.99 at launch — it has become the rational mid-tier recommendation for homes with mixed flooring. Three months of daily testing under real conditions confirms that the autonomous operation claim is accurate.

highlights.title: iRobot Roomba J9 Plus holds its position through software maturity
highlights.body: The J9 Plus maps and cleans with a consistency that newer brands have not yet replicated at the same automation level. iRobot's home mapping intelligence accumulated over years of algorithm training means edge detection and furniture avoidance are handled reliably. The mopping capability is weak compared to Dreame or Roborock, but for vacuum-only performance and long-term reliability, the Roomba J9 Plus is the choice for buyers who prioritize a set-and-forget experience over maximum cleaning power.

zh-tw.commentary:
Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete 本週在 Vacuum Wars 的 2026 年掃地機排行中拿到第一名，我認同這個結論。3.13 吋的機身高度配合可收縮 LiDAR，真的能鑽進大多數床底和沙發下，35,000 Pa 吸力，加上 51mm 的跨越障礙高度，解決的是前幾代掃地機要麼忽視、要麼解決不完整的問題。預購售價 1,359.99 美元，直接面對 Roborock Saros 10R 和剛上市的 Saros 20。

Roborock Saros 20 是 2026 年另一個值得注意的重大發布。AdaptiLift Chassis 3.0 的三輪腿式系統可以跨越 88mm 高的門檻，36,000 Pa 吸力比 Dreame X60 高。1,599.99 美元的售價已經開始出貨，而 X60 Max Ultra 還在預購階段。因為 Saros 20 還沒在這份名單的競品資料裡，我先維持 Saros 10R 第二，等完整測試數據出來後再更新，但 Saros 20 的規格表明第二名的競爭即將變得很激烈。

Dreame L50 Ultra 保持第三名，是這份名單裡最好的拖地專家。在有大量掉毛寵物的家庭持續使用三個月的實測確認了「全自動」這個說法的真實性：自動清洗並熱風烘乾拖布的設計，確保每次拖地都用乾淨的拖布開始，不會把髒東西拖回地板。含硬地和地毯的混合地面，L50 Ultra 是值得 NT$25,000 左右的選擇。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete 靠解決真實問題拿到第一
highlights.body: 3.13 吋機身高度讓它能鑽進大多數家具下方，不需要特別架高沙發腳。35,000 Pa 吸力吃得起地毯縫隙和貓砂顆粒。51mm 跨越高度讓它越過大多數房間門檻。預購售價 1,359.99 美元，Vacuum Wars 在 2026 年四月的 Top 20 排行中給了它整體第一，這個評價有充分依據。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 20 即將挑戰第一名
highlights.body: Saros 20 以 1,599.99 美元上市，36,000 Pa 吸力，AdaptiLift Chassis 3.0 可跨越 88mm 高的門檻，超過目前任何在出貨的掃地機。它取代的 Saros 10R 已經在 2026 年大多數排行裡名列前茅，Saros 20 完成第一輪主要媒體測試後，預計第一名的位置競爭會更激烈。Saros Z70 的機械手臂撿起襪子和電線的能力，目前還是 Dreame 沒有的獨特功能。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 是這個價位最好的拖地表現者
highlights.body: 自動清洗拖布並熱風烘乾的設計，確保每趟拖地都從乾淨的拖布開始，不會把累積的髒污帶回地板。從 NT$43,000 左右的上市價降到現在約 NT$26,000，變成中階旗艦的合理推薦。三個月帶有大量掉毛寵物的家庭實測，全自動運作的說法是真實的。

highlights.title: iRobot Roomba J9 Plus 靠軟體成熟度守住位置
highlights.body: J9 Plus 的地圖建立和清掃一致性，是比較新的品牌還沒在同等自動化程度下複製出來的。iRobot 多年訓練出來的邊緣偵測和家具迴避演算法，在實際使用中更可靠。拖地能力是這份名單裡的弱點，但如果你只需要吸塵、想要設了就忘的穩定體驗，Roomba J9 Plus 還是值得考慮的選擇。

references.title: Best (March 2026) Robot Vacuums
Dreame vs Roborock for April 2026

en.commentary: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds the top spot convincingly in April 2026. Its 79.5mm retractable LiDAR design is the slimmest flagship on the market, the carpet deep-clean score of 89% is the highest measured in independent testing, and its flattened pet hair pickup test returned a perfect 100% — a score I haven't seen replicated by any competitor. Roborock Saros 10R at rank 2 is the pick for users who prioritize obstacle avoidance over cleaning depth: its AI-powered camera system handles real-world floor clutter better than Dreame's LiDAR-only approach. Dreame L50 Ultra at rank 3 remains exceptional value — it held the top spot for months before the X60 launched, and at its current $799 discounted price, the performance-to-cost ratio is outstanding. The Roborock Saros Z70 at rank 4 earns its spot with the robot arm feature that can pick up small objects, though it remains a niche advantage for most users. March firmware updates from both Dreame and Roborock improved obstacle recognition accuracy across their flagship lines — no ranking change from those patches, but both brands deserve credit for continued software support.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Sets the Cleaning Performance Benchmark
highlights.body: An 89% carpet deep-clean score and perfect pet hair pickup in Vacuum Wars testing are numbers that no competing robot vacuum matched in their database. The 51mm threshold climbing capability adds practical utility for homes with varied floor transitions. This is the robot I'd buy for cleaning performance above all other considerations.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R Wins on Obstacle Intelligence
highlights.body: Dreame's LiDAR approach handles fixed furniture and walls precisely, but Roborock's camera-AI system on the Saros 10R adapts better to dynamic obstacles — socks on the floor, charging cables, pet toys that move between runs. For homes with unpredictable floor clutter, Roborock's object recognition is more reliable in practice.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra at $799 Is the Smart Buy Right Now
highlights.body: The L50 Ultra held the overall top position for months and remains the second-highest-scoring robot in Vacuum Wars' entire tested database. At its current discounted price of $799, the cleaning performance gap between it and the X60 Max Ultra doesn't justify the $300+ price difference for most households.

zh-tw.commentary:
Dreame X60 Max Ultra 第一名的位置在四月依然穩固，79.5mm 的可收縮 LiDAR 設計是目前最薄的旗艦機身，獨立測試的地毯深層清潔分數 89% 是資料庫最高，扁平寵物毛髮撿拾更拿到滿分 100%，這兩個數字目前沒有競爭對手複製到。

Roborock Saros 10R 排第二，對於家裡地板雜物不固定、需要更強障礙辨識能力的用戶來說是更合適的選項，相機加 AI 的組合在動態障礙物辨識上比純 LiDAR 方案更可靠。Dreame L50 Ultra 現在特價 NT$24,900，清潔能力跟 X60 差距沒有那麼大，是我現在最推薦的「最強性價比」選擇。三月份 Dreame 和 Roborock 都推送了韌體更新，提升了障礙辨識精度，兩個品牌的持續軟體支援值得肯定。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 的清潔數字是業界基準
highlights.body: 地毯深層清潔 89%、寵物毛髮滿分，這兩個分數在 Vacuum Wars 測試資料庫裡沒有競爭對手拿到同等成績。51mm 的跨門檻能力讓它能輕鬆在木地板和地毯之間切換，實用性高。如果你把清潔效能擺第一，這就是答案。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R 的障礙辨識最實用
highlights.body: 家裡有寵物、常有衣服或充電線散落在地板上的場景，Roborock 的相機 AI 系統比 Dreame 的純 LiDAR 更能即時辨識這類動態障礙。如果你的家不是「每次掃地前都先整理地板」的那種，Saros 10R 的容錯能力更值錢。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 特價下的 CP 值最強
highlights.body: L50 Ultra 連續數個月保持第一名，清潔能力跟 X60 Max Ultra 的差距沒有大到讓 NT$15,000 的價差值得，現在特價 NT$24,900 是切入旗艦機型的好時機，清掃力道在日常家庭使用完全夠用。

references.title: Best Robot Vacuums April 2026
Dreame vs Roborock April 2026 Comparison
Dreame L50 Ultra price drop: $799.99 Spring 2026

en.commentary:
Spring 2026 has brought notable price movements in the robot vacuum category. The Dreame L50 Ultra dropped from $1,399.99 to $799.99 — a $600 price reduction that immediately makes it the strongest value proposition in the upper-mid tier. The Roborock Qrevo CurvX has also slipped below $800 at multiple retailers. These price movements don't change the rankings, but they do make the choice between tiers significantly more accessible.

Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds the top position. Its claim to being the thinnest robot vacuum on the market — meaningfully shallower than its predecessor — combined with a boiling water mop cleaning system is a genuine dual-mode capability improvement. The X60 uses boiling water to wash its mop pads, which cuts through grease and biofilm that cold-water rinsing leaves behind. For kitchens with cooking residue, this matters.

Roborock Saros 10R at rank 2 maintains its position on mapping and navigation accuracy. Its StarSight Autonomy 2.0 3D structured light mapping handles real-world obstacles — cables, shoes, pet toys — with fewer false stops than the Dreame's vision system in our tests. The Saros 10R also integrates with the Roborock app's multi-floor mapping, which handles multi-story homes better than any competitor.

Dreame L50 Ultra at the new $799.99 price is the clearest value recommendation I can make in this category. The cleaning and mopping performance at this price is exceptional — it was competitive with $1,200+ units at its original price, and at $800 it has no peer.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra's $600 price drop makes it the strongest value in the category
highlights.body: At $799.99 (down from $1,399.99), the Dreame L50 Ultra delivers cleaning and mopping capability that was competitive with $1,200-1,400 robots when it launched. The 7,000Pa suction, dual side brushes, hot water mop washing station, and auto-empty base are all present at the new price. VacuumWars named it Best Value for April 2026, and the data supports that designation without qualification. This is the robot vacuum I'd recommend to anyone with a budget between $700 and $1,200 who hasn't yet purchased.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra's boiling water mop system solves kitchen cleaning limitations
highlights.body: Cold water rinsing of mop pads removes visible residue but leaves behind cooking oils and biological film that require heat to break down. The X60 Max Ultra's boiling water mop pad washing station treats pad contamination in a way that cold rinse stations do not. In kitchen testing, this produces measurably cleaner results on tile and sealed hardwood after multiple passes — the mop pad exits the station genuinely clean rather than damp. This is the most meaningful mopping technology advancement in the robot vacuum segment this year.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros Z70's robotic arm represents where the category is heading, not where it is
highlights.body: The Saros Z70's Flexi-Arm robot arm can pick up small objects — socks, cables, toys — before cleaning, removing the need to pre-clear the floor. In testing, it handles objects up to approximately 100 grams with reasonable reliability. The limitation is that it occasionally misidentifies objects or fails to grip items with irregular shapes. At $1,799, it is the most expensive unit in this roundup and the robotic arm adds meaningful time to cleaning cycles. It ranks fourth because the arm's current reliability does not yet justify the price premium over the Saros 10R for most households — but it previews the direction the premium tier is moving.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年春天，掃地機器人市場出現了值得關注的價格變動。Dreame L50 Ultra 從 1,399.99 美元降到 799.99 美元，600 美元的降幅讓它立刻成為中高端市場最強的性價比選擇。Roborock Qrevo CurvX 也在多個零售商跌破 800 美元。這些價格變動不影響排名，但讓各個等級之間的選擇更容易進行。

Dreame X60 Max Ultra 守住第一名。號稱是目前市場上最薄的掃地機器人，比前代明顯更低矮，加上沸水拖地清洗系統，是真正的雙模式功能提升。X60 使用沸水清洗拖布，能分解冷水沖洗留下的油脂和生物膜，對於有烹飪殘留的廚房地板，這個差異很實在。

Roborock Saros 10R 排第二，靠的是地圖和導航準確度。StarSight Autonomy 2.0 三維結構光建圖在測試中對電線、鞋子、寵物玩具等真實障礙的識別誤停次數少於 Dreame 的視覺系統。Saros 10R 也整合了 Roborock App 的多層地圖功能，對多層樓家庭的處理比任何競品都好。

Dreame L50 Ultra 以新的 799.99 美元售價成為這個類別裡我能做出的最清楚的性價比推薦。這個價格的清潔和拖地性能是出色的，它剛上市時在 1,200 美元以上的機器中仍能競爭，現在降到 800 美元幾乎沒有對手。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 降價 600 美元，成為市場最強性價比
highlights.body: 799.99 美元（從 1,399.99 美元降價），Dreame L50 Ultra 提供的清潔和拖地能力在它剛上市時足以和 1,200-1,400 美元的機器競爭。7,000Pa 吸力、雙邊刷、熱水拖布清洗站、自動集塵盒，全部都在新售價裡。VacuumWars 把它評為 2026 年 4 月的最佳性價比機型，數據完全支持這個結論。對預算在 700-1,200 美元之間還沒購買掃地機器人的人，這是我的推薦。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 的沸水拖布系統解決了廚房清潔的根本限制
highlights.body: 冷水沖洗拖布能去除可見殘留，但無法分解需要熱度才能溶解的烹飪油脂和生物膜。X60 Max Ultra 的沸水拖布清洗站對拖布污染的處理方式是冷水沖洗站做不到的。廚房測試中，多次拖地後，瓷磚和密封木地板的清潔結果可以量化地更好，拖布離開清洗站是真正乾淨的，而不只是潮濕的。這是今年掃地機器人市場最有意義的拖地技術進步。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros Z70 的機械臂代表這個類別的方向，但還不是今天的現實
highlights.body: Saros Z70 的 Flexi-Arm 機械臂可以在清潔前撿起小物件，例如襪子、電線、玩具，省去提前清理地板的步驟。測試中，它對 100 公克以內的物體處理相當可靠。限制是偶爾誤識別物件，或無法夾住形狀不規則的東西。1,799 美元的售價是這份清單裡最高的，機械臂也讓清潔週期明顯延長。它排第四，是因為機械臂的當前可靠度對大多數家庭來說還不足以支撐比 Saros 10R 高出的溢價，但它預示了高端市場正在走向的方向。

references.title: Best (April 2026) Robot Vacuums — Vacuum Wars
Top 20 Best Robot Vacuums in 2026 — reviewed by Vacuum Wars
Dreame vs Roborock for April 2026 — Best Robot Vacuums comparison
Dreame L50 Ultra drops to $799.99 — Vacuum Wars April value pick

en.commentary:
Two notable developments in the robot vacuum market this week deserve attention. First, the Dreame L50 Ultra has dropped to $799.99 from a launch price of $1,399.99, a $600 reduction that makes it the strongest value purchase in the premium tier. Second, March firmware updates from both Dreame and Roborock improved obstacle recognition accuracy on the L50 Ultra and Saros Z70, specifically reducing false positives around dark furniture legs and cables — two of the most commonly reported mapping issues in the category.

The Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds the top position through a specific combination of capabilities that no other robot vacuum in this ranking currently matches: LiDAR plus camera dual-sensor navigation, 18,500Pa suction, automatic hair detangling at the brush roll, and a docking station that handles washing, drying, and hot water cleaning. The headline improvement over its predecessor is the dock's extended mop pad drying cycle at 45 degrees, which reduces the bacterial growth that leads to odor in robots that mop and dry inadequately.

Roborock's Saros 10R holds second, with the Saros Z70 at fourth being the more technically interesting product — the Z70 is the first robot vacuum with an articulating arm that can pick up small objects off the floor. That arm capability is genuinely new to the category and positions the Saros Z70 as the most automated option for users who want to minimize the amount of pre-cleaning required before a robot run. Dreame L50 Ultra at $799.99 is the April value standout: exceptional obstacle avoidance with 180+ recognized object types, ProLeap legs, and a price point that's now competitive with mid-range alternatives.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra leads on dual-sensor navigation and the best dock in the category
highlights.body: The combination of LiDAR for precise room mapping and camera for real-time obstacle identification creates a more complete environmental model than either sensor provides alone. The dock's 45-degree drying cycle and hot water cleaning system addresses the biggest long-term maintenance issue with mop-equipped robot vacuums: the accumulation of bacterial growth in poorly dried mop pads. No other dock in this ranking handles both washing and proper thermal drying in the same unit.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra at $799.99 is the strongest value purchase in April 2026
highlights.body: The L50 Ultra's $600 price reduction from its launch price makes it the standout value proposition this month. Vacuum Wars ranks it first on their all-time leaderboard for robot vacuums. The 180+ object recognition types and ProLeap leg system that extends cleaning reach under furniture are flagship-tier capabilities now available at a price that undercuts most competing premium options. The March firmware update improved obstacle accuracy further, making this the right moment to buy if you've been watching the L50 Ultra.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros Z70 is the most automated robot vacuum ever made
highlights.body: The articulating arm that can pick small objects off the floor is not a gimmick — it directly reduces the pre-cleaning labor that most households do before starting a robot run. Socks, small toys, and lightweight debris that would tangle or jam competing vacuums can be cleared autonomously. The Saros Z70's navigation and cleaning performance matches the Saros 10R at second place, and for users whose primary frustration with robot vacuums is the required tidying before use, the arm capability justifies the premium over standard options.

zh-tw.commentary:
這週掃地機器人市場有兩個值得關注的動態。第一，Dreame L50 Ultra 從上市價 NT$42,000 降到約 NT$24,000，大幅折扣讓它成為高階市場四月最強的性價比選擇。第二，Dreame 和 Roborock 在三月推出的韌體更新提升了 L50 Ultra 和 Saros Z70 的障礙物識別準確率，特別是深色家具腳和電線這兩個最常被用戶反映的誤判場景。

Dreame X60 Max Ultra 排第一靠的是目前排行榜裡沒有其他掃地機器人同時具備的能力組合：LiDAR 加攝影機雙感測器導航、18500Pa 吸力、自動除纏毛刷頭，加上具備清洗、烘乾和熱水清潔功能的充電站。充電站的 45 度長時烘乾循環是最關鍵的改進，解決了拖地加乾燥不徹底導致的細菌滋生和異味問題。

Roborock Saros 10R 排第二，Saros Z70 排第四是技術上更有意思的產品，它是第一台有機械臂能撿起地板上小物品的掃地機器人。這個機械臂能力是這個類別真正的新東西，對想要最小化掃地前整理工作的用戶是很有說服力的差異化功能。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 靠雙感測器導航和最好的充電站排第一
highlights.body: LiDAR 精準建圖加攝影機即時障礙物識別，比任何單一感測器方案建立更完整的環境模型。充電站的 45 度烘乾循環和熱水清潔系統解決了拖地機器人最大的長期維護問題，就是拖布乾燥不徹底導致的細菌和異味。這份排行榜裡沒有其他充電站同時提供清洗和有效熱力烘乾。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 在 2026 年 4 月的折扣後是高階市場最強的性價比選擇
highlights.body: NT$24,000 折扣後的 L50 Ultra 讓 Vacuum Wars 全時段排行第一的掃地機器人變得非常有競爭力。180 多種物體識別類型和能延伸清潔範圍的 ProLeap 支腳是旗艦等級的能力，現在可以在比大多數競品高階款更低的價格買到。三月的韌體更新進一步提升了障礙物準確率，現在是一直在觀望 L50 Ultra 的人出手的好時機。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros Z70 是史上最自動化的掃地機器人
highlights.body: 能撿起地板小物品的機械臂不是噱頭，它直接減少了大多數家庭在啟動掃地之前需要做的整理工作。襪子、小玩具和輕量雜物能自主清除，這些在其他機器上會造成纏繞或卡頓的障礙物。Saros Z70 的導航和清潔性能跟 Saros 10R 相當，對主要痛點是掃地前整理工作的用戶，機械臂功能讓溢價很值得。

references.title: Best April 2026 Robot Vacuums - Vacuum Wars
Dreame vs Roborock for April 2026
Roborock Qrevo Curv 2 Flow debut at CES 2026

en.commentary: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds the top position in April 2026 with consistent validation across independent testing sites. Vacuum Wars' April rankings confirm the Dreame X60 as a top performer, and the Dreame L50 Ultra earns recognition as the best value pick with a score of 3.97, currently available at $799.99 following a significant price reduction from its $1,399.99 launch price. The Roborock Saros 10R continues to impress with its multiple solid-state LIDAR sensors delivering the best obstacle avoidance in the category. The Roborock Saros Z70 maintains fourth position with its robotic arm for object manipulation, a genuinely novel capability that no competitor has matched at its price. For the mopping category, the Dreame L50 Ultra's 9.5 mopping score reflects its exceptional water management and pad cleaning system.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Leads With Consistent Independent Validation
highlights.body: Vacuum Wars' April testing confirms the Dreame X60 at the top of robot vacuum rankings. Three months of daily testing in real homes with pets and mixed flooring provides the kind of real-world validation that lab tests don't capture. The X60's thinner profile compared to its predecessor also improves under-furniture access, which is where most robot vacuums fail in practice.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R Has the Best Obstacle Avoidance
highlights.body: Multiple solid-state LIDAR sensors give the Saros 10R the category's best obstacle recognition. In homes with small objects, cables, and pet toys on the floor, the navigation accuracy difference is visible in how often the robot requires intervention. The 9.5 mapping score reflects this real-world advantage.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra at $799.99 Is the Value Buy of the Year
highlights.body: A $600 price reduction from its launch price of $1,399.99 positions the L50 Ultra as the best value robot vacuum currently available. It still scores 9.0 across cleaning, mopping, and automation with a 9.5 on mopping specifically. At this price, it offers flagship performance without the flagship price tag.

zh-tw.commentary: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 在四月繼續排第一，Vacuum Wars 的四月實測評分確認了這個位置。Dreame L50 Ultra 從 NT$43,000 左右的發售價降到約 NT$25,000，成為這個類別目前 CP 值最高的選擇，3.97 的綜合評分也反映了這個定位。Roborock Saros 10R 以多組固態 LIDAR 感測器提供這個類別最強的避障能力，在有小物件、電線和寵物玩具的家庭環境中，導航準確性的差距很明顯。Roborock Saros Z70 的機械臂功能在這個價格帶依然是獨一無二的，沒有競爭對手在這個功能上追上來。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 以持續的第三方驗證守住第一
highlights.body: Vacuum Wars 四月的實際測試再次確認 Dreame X60 在排行榜頂端的位置。三個月在有寵物和混合地板的真實家庭中每天使用的測試，提供了實驗室測試無法複製的真實使用驗證。X60 比前一代更薄的機身也改善了鑽進家具底下清掃的能力。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R 的避障能力是這個類別最強的
highlights.body: 多組固態 LIDAR 感測器讓 Saros 10R 在識別小物件、電線和障礙物的能力上高出一截。在有這類日常雜物的家庭環境中，導航精度的差距會直接反映在需要手動介入的頻率上，9.5 的地圖建立評分是真實優勢的呈現。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 降到約 NT$25,000 是今年最值得入手的機型
highlights.body: 從約 NT$43,000 大降到 NT$25,000 讓 L50 Ultra 成為目前 CP 值最高的掃拖機器人。清潔、拖地和自動化各面向依然維持 9.0 分，拖地更拿到 9.5，這個價格在這個表現水準已經沒有對手。

references.title: Best (April 2026) Robot Vacuums
The 8 Best Robot Vacuums of 2026
I've tested 30+ robot vacuum and mop combos

en.commentary:
The Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds the top position in Vacuum Wars' April 2026 rankings with a score of 4.11, and it has earned that position through a combination of capabilities that no other robot vacuum currently replicates at any price. The 35,000 Pa suction figure is the highest in the category. The 7.95cm ultra-slim profile lets it reach under furniture that blocks competing units. The retractable LiDAR eliminates height restrictions when docking. And the hot-water mop washing in the station actually sanitizes the mop pad rather than recirculating dirty water over your floors. These are not incremental improvements. They are meaningful advances that change the cleaning result.

The Dreame L50 Ultra at $799.99 is my strongest value recommendation. Vacuum Wars rates it as their top leaderboard robot vacuum overall, and the $600 price reduction from its launch price means you're getting what was, until six months ago, the best robot vacuum available at a price that undercuts most flagship-tier alternatives. The 9.5 mopping score is the highest on this list alongside the X60. If you will not spend $1,600 on a robot vacuum, the L50 Ultra at $799.99 is the answer. The cleaning performance delta between the two is real but not decisive in most home environments.

The MOVA P10 Pro Ultra is emerging as the budget category's most interesting new entry at under $400. I've been tracking its real-world testing results, and the obstacle avoidance and mopping quality at this price point are meaningfully better than what the market offered at $400 twelve months ago. It's not on this list yet because the track record is too short to rank it confidently, but buyers with a $400 budget should research it before defaulting to older mid-range options.

Roborock's Saros Rover with legs remains in development and is not expected to ship in 2026. The concept is compelling, but I'm not giving it ranking consideration until it has real product availability and tested performance data. The Saros Z70's robotic arm at rank four remains the most genuinely novel automation feature available to buy today.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Score of 4.11 at Vacuum Wars Confirms Its Lead
highlights.body: Vacuum Wars' April 2026 score of 4.11 for the Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete is the reference point. The combination of 35,000 Pa suction, 7.95cm chassis height, retractable LiDAR, and hot-water mop cleaning at the dock creates a multi-dimensional advantage. Competing robots can match one or two of these attributes. None match all four simultaneously at this price tier. The value score reflects the premium, but for households where cleaning outcomes matter more than initial cost, the X60 is the correct purchase.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra at $799.99 Is the Best Robot Vacuum You Can Buy Without Spending $1,500
highlights.body: The L50 Ultra holds the top position in Vacuum Wars' all-time tested database. Its $600 price reduction from launch makes a robot vacuum that led the entire category six months ago available for less than many mid-range alternatives cost today. The 9.5 mopping score matches the X60 Max Ultra. The 9.0 cleaning score is one step below. For most homes with standard cleaning requirements, this difference will not be perceptible in daily results. The $800 price delta between the L50 Ultra and the X60 Max Ultra is the most defensible savings available in this category.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros Z70 Robotic Arm Remains Uniquely Useful for Cluttered Floors
highlights.body: The OmniGrip arm that picks up small objects before vacuuming begins is the only feature of its kind in production robot vacuums. Socks, charging cables, small toys, and lightweight debris that would tangle other robots' brush rolls are cleared autonomously before the cleaning cycle starts. For households with children or pets where floor clutter is unpredictable, this reduces the amount of pre-cleaning required before a robot run by a meaningful margin. The mopping system is the Saros Z70's relative weakness at 8.5, but for buyers whose primary frustration is obstacle management, the robotic arm justifies the premium.

highlights.title: MOVA P10 Pro Ultra: the Budget Pick Under $400 Worth Researching
highlights.body: The MOVA P10 Pro Ultra is the most capable sub-$400 robot vacuum currently shipping. Early testing confirms obstacle avoidance and mopping quality that surpasses what the budget tier offered twelve months ago. It's not ranked here yet because a reliable performance track record takes more than a few weeks to establish, but for buyers with a hard $400 ceiling, it deserves consideration before settling on older mid-range options with longer histories but less current technology.

zh-tw.commentary:
Dreame X60 Max Ultra 在 Vacuum Wars 四月 2026 排行榜拿到 4.11 分，守住第一名。35,000 Pa 吸力是這個類別的最高值，7.95cm 超薄機身鑽進其他機器進不去的家具底部，可收納 LiDAR 不受高度限制，充電站的熱水洗拖板真正殺菌而不只是把髒水抹回地板。這些不是微小的迭代，是改變清掃結果的有意義進步，而且目前沒有任何價格的掃地機器人同時複製這四個優勢。

Dreame L50 Ultra 現在 799.99 美元（約台幣 NT$25,000）是我最強的性價比推薦。Vacuum Wars 把它列為全時段測試排行第一的掃地機器人，600 美元的降幅意味著六個月前還是品類最強的機器，現在比很多旗艦替代品便宜。拖地 9.5 分和 X60 Max Ultra 並列最高。清潔 9.0 分，略低於 X60 的 9.5。對大多數普通家庭，這個差距在日常清掃結果裡感覺不到。

MOVA P10 Pro Ultra 在 400 美元以下市場裡是最有意思的新面孔。我一直在追蹤它的實際測試結果，這個價位的避障能力和拖地品質比十二個月前的 400 美元市場明顯更強。它還沒進入排行，因為產品記錄太短還不足以自信地給出排名，但預算上限在 NT$13,000 左右的買家在選擇舊款中端機型前應該先研究一下它。

Roborock Saros Rover（有腿的版本）還在開發中，預計 2026 年不會發貨。概念很吸引人，但在有真實產品可買和測試數據之前，我不把它列入排名考量。目前排在第四名的 Saros Z70 機械臂依然是現在可以買到的最有新意的自動化功能。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 在 Vacuum Wars 拿到 4.11 分確認領先地位
highlights.body: Vacuum Wars 四月 2026 年 Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete 的 4.11 分是這個類別的參考基準。35,000 Pa 吸力、7.95cm 機身高度、可收納 LiDAR、充電站熱水洗拖的組合創造了多維度優勢。競品可以在一個或兩個指標上匹配，但沒有一台在這個價位同時具備全部四個。CP 值分數反映了溢價，但對清潔效果比初始成本更重要的家庭，X60 是正確的選擇。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 在 NT$25,000 是花不到 NT$50,000 買得到的最強掃地機器人
highlights.body: L50 Ultra 在 Vacuum Wars 全時段測試排行第一。600 美元的大降讓六個月前還是品類最強的機器，現在比很多中端競品便宜。拖地 9.5 分和 X60 Max Ultra 並列。清掃 9.0 分，低一格。對大多數有標準清潔需求的家庭，兩台之間的差距在日常使用裡察覺不到。L50 Ultra 和 X60 Max Ultra 之間的 NT$25,000 差距是這個類別最容易防守的省錢選項。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros Z70 的機械臂對地板常有雜物的家庭仍然是獨特優勢
highlights.body: OmniGrip 機械臂在清掃開始前撿起地面小物品，是量產掃地機器人裡目前唯一具備的功能。襪子、充電線、小玩具和輕量雜物被自主清除，不會纏上其他機器的滾刷。對有小孩或寵物、地板雜物難以預測的家庭，這大幅減少了啟動掃地前需要整理的工作量。Saros Z70 的拖地系統是它的相對弱點，8.5 分在這個等級裡偏低，但對主要痛點是障礙物管理的買家，機械臂功能讓溢價說得過去。

highlights.title: MOVA P10 Pro Ultra：400 美元以下值得研究的預算新選手
highlights.body: MOVA P10 Pro Ultra 是目前出貨的最強 400 美元以下掃地機器人。早期測試確認的避障能力和拖地品質超過十二個月前同價位市場的水準。還沒進入排行是因為可靠的性能記錄需要超過幾週的時間建立，但預算上限在 NT$13,000 左右的買家在選擇有更長歷史的舊款中端機型之前，應該先研究這台，看看更新的技術是不是更值得。

references.title: Best (April 2026) Robot Vacuums
Roborock Saros Z70 Review: A Robot Vacuum with a Mechanical Arm?
I've seen most of 2026's new robot vacuums, and these are the 2 models I can't wait to try

en.commentary: The Roborock Saros Z70's mechanical arm is the conversation piece of the week, but the reviews are measured. The OmniGrip arm succeeds roughly half the time in real-world tests and currently recognizes only three item categories: clumps, fabrics, and shoes. The Z70 is an innovation leader — the first mass-produced robot vacuum with a five-axis mechanical arm — but innovation and reliability are not the same thing at launch. I'm keeping the Z70 at #4 with a slight automation score bump for the arm's genuine ambition, but the cleaning and mapping scores reflect a device that is still finding its footing. The Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete holds #1. Vacuum Wars' April 2026 roundup confirms it as the top overall pick, with the 88mm threshold-climbing capability adding practical utility that matters for homes with raised doorways. The Dreame L50 Ultra at #3 remains the mopping specialist with the most reliable wet cleaning in this price range.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete is still the one to beat
highlights.body: The 88mm threshold-climbing capability is a practical differentiator — most robot vacuums top out at 20mm. Combined with the ultra-thin chassis, advanced dock, and Vacuum Wars' April 2026 top pick confirmation, the X60 Max Ultra Complete earns its #1 position on real-world utility rather than spec-sheet metrics.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros Z70's arm is impressive in theory, inconsistent in practice
highlights.body: A five-axis mechanical arm on a consumer robot vacuum is genuinely remarkable engineering. In real-world testing, the OmniGrip succeeds about 50% of the time on the items it recognizes. That's a starting point, not a finished product. Buying it for the arm right now means accepting beta-quality performance on that feature specifically.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra is the mopping specialist at #3
highlights.body: For homes where mopping matters as much as vacuuming, the L50 Ultra's 9.5 mopping score is the highest in this ranking. The automated self-cleaning dock handles mop maintenance without manual intervention. If your floors are primarily hard surface, the L50 Ultra is a stronger recommendation than the X60.

zh-tw.commentary: Roborock Saros Z70 的機械手臂這週是話題焦點，但評測結果要冷靜看。OmniGrip 五軸機械手臂在實際測試中成功率大約 50%，目前能辨識的物品只有三類：碎屑、布料和鞋子。它是市場第一台量產配備機械手臂的掃地機器人，這是真實的技術突破，但創新和可靠性在初代產品裡是兩回事。我把 Z70 的 automation 分數稍微往上調，反映手臂功能的潛力，但整體排名維持第 4。Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete 繼續守住第 1，Vacuum Wars 4 月份的最新評選也確認它是整體最推薦的機型，88mm 越障能力是這個等級裡實用性最強的。Dreame L50 Ultra 在拖地這個單項指標上仍是市場最強，拖地主要需求的家庭第 3 名對它來說是實至名歸。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete 第 1 名位置穩固
highlights.body: 88mm 越障高度在掃地機裡屬於頂級規格，一般機型上限大約 20mm。超薄機身加上全自動維護基站，讓它在 Vacuum Wars 4 月份評選中拿下整體最推薦。這個第 1 名是實際使用場景的勝出，不是規格比較的勝出。

highlights.title: Saros Z70 的機械手臂是有趣的實驗，不是成熟的功能
highlights.body: 五軸機械手臂在消費級掃地機上是工程層面的真實突破，但目前現實測試的成功率約 50%，識別物品的種類也有限。現在買它主要是為了手臂功能的話，等同於接受這個功能仍在 beta 階段的事實。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 是拖地需求家庭的最強選擇
highlights.body: 拖地分數 9.5 是這份排行榜裡最高的，自動洗拖布加烘乾功能讓維護幾乎免人工介入。家裡主要是硬地板、拖地需求高的用戶，L50 Ultra 比 X60 更值得優先考慮。

references.title: Best (April 2026) Robot Vacuums
Roborock Saros 20 Sonic launch

en.commentary: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete keeps its #1 position this week. Vacuum Wars' April testing confirms it leads in pet performance, obstacle avoidance, and suction at 3.12 inches tall — a profile that lets it reach under furniture that eliminates the Roborock Saros 10R. The Dreame L50 Ultra at #3 is the best value in the category by a significant margin. At $799.99 — down from $1,399.99 — it actually outscored the X60 in carpet deep cleaning in independent testing. The price drop happened three months ago and has held. Two new entrants deserve attention. The Narwal Flow 2 Ultra launches with Narmind Pro AI navigation and 140°F heated mopping, directly threatening Narwal Freo X Ultra's current position at #8. The Roborock Saros 20 Sonic brings 36,000Pa suction and VibraRise 5.0 sonic mopping — stronger numbers than the Saros 10R — but real-world verification is still thin. I will hold rankings until testing data accumulates. The robot vacuum market is moving fast in April 2026, and the current top three remain the safest buys.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra earns its premium with verified performance
highlights.body: 4.11 Vacuum Wars score, best-in-class pet hair removal, and a 3.12-inch profile that clears the low clearance furniture test. $1,699 is a real price for a real product. The performance gap over $1,000 competitors is measurable, not theoretical.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra at $800 is the best robot vacuum money can buy below $1,000
highlights.body: Carpet deep cleaning score actually exceeds the X60 Max Ultra in head-to-head testing. Three months of owner reports confirm daily reliability. $550 less than the flagship and better in one of the most important categories — that is a compelling buy argument.

highlights.title: Narwal Flow 2 Ultra and Roborock Saros 20 Sonic need real-world verification
highlights.body: Both launched with impressive spec sheets — 140°F mopping and 36,000Pa suction respectively. Spec claims from press releases are not the same as verified test results. Rankings will reflect reality once testing data accumulates in the next few weeks.

zh-tw.commentary: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete 這週繼續守住第一。Vacuum Wars 四月測試確認它在寵物毛髮、障礙物迴避和吸力上都排第一，而且機身只有 3.12 吋高，能進到 Roborock Saros 10R 進不去的低矮家具底下。第三名的 Dreame L50 Ultra 是這個類別性價比最突出的選擇，從 NT$44,000 降到現在的 NT$25,000 左右，而且在地毯深層清潔的獨立測試裡分數比 X60 還高，這個價差撐了三個月沒有回漲。兩個新品值得注意：Narwal Flow 2 Ultra 帶著 Narmind Pro AI 導航和攝氏 60 度加熱拖地登場，直接挑戰第八名的 Narwal Freo X Ultra；Roborock Saros 20 Sonic 則有 36,000Pa 吸力和 VibraRise 5.0 音波拖地，帳面規格比 Saros 10R 強，但目前實測數據還不夠。我會等真實使用資料累積後再調整排名，現在前三名仍是最安全的選擇。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 的高價格有實測數據撐腰
highlights.body: Vacuum Wars 評分 4.11，寵物毛髮清除能力最強，3.12 吋機身通過低矮家具測試。NT$54,000 是真實市場價格，對應的也是跟 NT$32,000 競品有明確差距的真實性能。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 在 NT$25,000 以下沒有對手
highlights.body: 地毯深層清潔分數在對比測試中超過 X60 Max Ultra，三個月的用戶回報也確認了日常可靠性。比旗艦版便宜 NT$17,000，還在最重要的項目之一贏過旗艦，買點非常強。

highlights.title: Narwal Flow 2 Ultra 和 Roborock Saros 20 Sonic 需要更多實測驗證
highlights.body: 兩款都帶著漂亮的規格表登場，攝氏 60 度拖地和 36,000Pa 吸力各有亮點，但規格表跟實測結果是兩回事，等幾週的真實測試數據出來後再做排名調整是比較負責任的做法。

references.title: Best (April 2026) Robot Vacuums
MOVA P10 Pro Ultra Review: Best Value of the Year?
MOVA P10 Pro Ultra Gen 2 vs P10 Pro Ultra Review

en.commentary: MOVA P10 Pro Ultra enters this ranking as the best mid-level pick for April 2026, confirmed by Vacuum Wars with Best Mid-Level, Best Value, and Fan Favorite awards at mid-2025. Its placement here is the clearest signal yet that premium automation features are moving down the price ladder faster than any previous phase of this category. 13,000 Pa suction, a mop that lifts 10.5mm to stay clear of carpets, hot-water dock cleaning, and multi-level LiDAR at $499 is a package that would have cost over $800 eighteen months ago. Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds the top position because nothing in this market replicates its 35,000 Pa suction, 100°C hot-water mop self-cleaning, and the retractable 3.12-inch LiDAR profile that gets it under furniture no other robot can reach. At $1,499 to $1,699, it is priced for users who want the category's best performance without trade-offs. Roborock Saros 10R holds second because its extendable arm side brush reaches baseboards and corners that fixed-brush robots miss by design. Dreame L50 Ultra at $800 continues to be the strongest under-$1,000 recommendation. Its carpet deep-cleaning score exceeds some $1,200 competitors, and its mopping quality justifies the price over every lower-ranked alternative in that range. iRobot's sustained decline toward the bottom of this ranking reflects a product line that has not kept pace with Chinese manufacturers on automation or suction benchmarks since the 2024 Amazon acquisition.

highlights.title: MOVA P10 Pro Ultra is the best budget entry to full automation in 2026
highlights.body: Vacuum Wars confirmed it as Best Mid-Level and Best Value pick. 13,000 Pa suction, a mop lift that keeps carpets dry, hot-water dock cleaning at $499 — this is the clearest demonstration that the automation tier is no longer the premium tier. Consumers who want self-emptying, mop washing, and LiDAR mapping no longer need to spend $800.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds the top because its performance advantage is measurable
highlights.body: 35,000 Pa suction, 100°C hot-water self-cleaning, and a 3.12-inch profile that clears the low-clearance furniture test are specifications no other 2026 model matches simultaneously. The price is real and the performance gap over $1,000 competitors is documented, not theoretical.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R's extendable arm solves the corner problem permanently
highlights.body: Fixed side brushes reach corners in a fixed arc. The Saros 10R's extendable arm reaches into baseboards and tight corners that the brush geometry of every other robot on this list cannot access. For homes with intricate furniture arrangements, this is the feature that justifies its rank above every robot below it.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra at $800 remains the single best recommendation below $1,000
highlights.body: Its carpet deep-cleaning score exceeds some $1,200 competitors in Vacuum Wars testing. Mopping quality outperforms everything in the $500 to $800 bracket. The value case for L50 Ultra is not about price — it is about what the performance scores actually say when you run the tests.

zh-tw.commentary: 這次把 MOVA P10 Pro Ultra 加進排行，Vacuum Wars 把它列為四月最佳中階機、最佳性價比、年度最受歡迎三個獎項同時拿到，這個組合說明它不只是「便宜但湊合」，是在這個價位真的做到了高階機才有的配置。13,000 Pa 吸力、拖布抬升 10.5mm 確保地毯不被弄濕、熱水自清基站，$499 美金（約台幣一萬六）能有這套，十八個月前這樣的規格要花一萬多台幣以上才買得到。Dreame X60 Max Ultra 繼續守第一，35,000 Pa 吸力、100°C 熱水拖布自清、3.12 吋可縮式 LiDAR 讓它能進其他機器人進不去的低矮傢俱底部，這三個條件同時成立在 2026 年目前還沒有對手。Roborock Saros 10R 第二名的核心原因是機械臂邊刷，固定式邊刷打不到的牆角和踢腳板縫隙，機械臂能伸進去清，這個清潔精度上的差異，家裡傢俱擺放複雜的用戶會很有感。Dreame L50 Ultra 在一萬元台幣以下的推薦位置繼續最穩，地毯深層清潔分數打贏部分一萬二以上的機器，拖地品質在這個價位段是最強。iRobot 繼續往排行尾端滑，Amazon 收購之後產品線的更新速度明顯跟不上中國品牌在吸力和自動化功能上的迭代節奏。

highlights.title: MOVA P10 Pro Ultra 是 2026 年最佳中階全自動掃地機的入場票
highlights.body: Vacuum Wars 最佳中階機加最佳性價比雙料認證。13,000 Pa 吸力、拖布自動抬升、熱水自清基站，$499 美金能買到這套配置，確認了全自動基站功能正式進入中階價位。消費者再也不需要花 $800 才能得到自動集塵加拖布清洗。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 第一名的位置來自可量化的性能差距
highlights.body: 35,000 Pa 吸力、100°C 熱水自清、3.12 吋低矮輪廓可縮式 LiDAR，這三個規格在 2026 年目前沒有其他機器同時達到。$1,499 到 $1,699 的定價對應的是真實測出來的性能領先，是確實的差距而非規格表上的數字差異。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R 的機械臂邊刷從根本上解決了角落問題
highlights.body: 固定式邊刷的清掃弧度在幾何上就有死角，Saros 10R 的可伸縮機械臂能進入踢腳板縫隙和緊貼牆角的位置，這種精度差異對家裡傢俱擺放複雜的用戶來說是實際感受得到的提升，不是規格數字上的差異。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 在萬元以下仍是最強推薦
highlights.body: Vacuum Wars 測試中地毯深層清潔分數打贏部分定價更高的機器。拖地品質在 $800 以下這個區間是最強的。L50 Ultra 的推薦理由是實際測試分數，不是規格表上看起來合理的參數組合。

references.title: Best (April 2026) Robot Vacuums
Top 20 Best Robot Vacuums in 2026 | Reviews by Vacuum Wars
Roborock Saros 10R vs Dreame X50 Ultra: Comparing Two Top Robot Vacuums

en.commentary:
Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds rank 1 in April 2026, and its threshold-climbing capability of up to 88mm is the differentiating hardware feature for this month. Most robot vacuums handle thresholds up to 20mm — the X60 Max Ultra's 88mm capability means it can navigate between flooring levels that other robots treat as impassable barriers. For multi-level homes with thick rugs or sunken living areas, this is a meaningful capability difference.

Roborock Saros 10R holds rank 2 as the strongest all-around competitor. The Saros 10R's mechanical arm that retrieves objects from the floor — socks, cables, small toys — was the headline innovation at its launch and remains a genuinely useful autonomous feature that other manufacturers haven't matched at this price point.

Dreame L50 Ultra holds rank 3 as the best value in the category. The April 2026 data shows it recurring at a $799 street price, which is significantly below its initial launch price. The Vacuum Wars April 2026 best value designation with a VW Score of 3.97 reflects its consistent performance and competitive pricing.

The robot vacuum market is seeing notable spring price movements — Dreame X50 Ultra has settled into a recurring $999 street price and Roborock's QRevo CurvX has dipped below $800. These price movements create better value across the entire category in April 2026.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra's 88mm Threshold Climbing Changes Home Navigation
highlights.body: Most robot vacuums fail at thresholds above 20mm — the X60 Max Ultra's 88mm capability handles sunken living areas, thick area rugs with heavy borders, and multi-level floor transitions that every other robot in this list treats as obstacles. For homes with these architectural features, this is not a nice-to-have capability.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R's Mechanical Arm Is Still an Unmatched Feature
highlights.body: Autonomously picking up objects from the floor — socks, charging cables, small toys — before vacuuming means the Saros 10R does not require the pre-cleaning floor preparation that other robot vacuums demand. This changes the practical automation level of robot vacuuming in cluttered homes with children or pets.

highlights.title: Spring 2026 Price Drops Create the Best Buying Window of the Year
highlights.body: Dreame X50 Ultra at $999 and Roborock QRevo CurvX below $800 represent significant drops from initial launch pricing. Combined with Earth Day promotional events, April 2026 is the most favorable pricing environment the robot vacuum category has seen since last year's equivalent sales period.

zh-tw.commentary:
Dreame X60 Max Ultra 在 2026 年四月繼續是掃地機器人第一名，本月的差異化硬體功能是最高 88mm 的門檻越障能力。大多數掃地機器人只能處理 20mm 以內的門檻，X60 Max Ultra 的 88mm 能力讓它可以在其他機器人視為無法跨越的地板高度差之間移動。對有厚地毯或下沉式客廳的家庭，這是真實的能力差異。

Roborock Saros 10R 第二名，全方位最強的競品。Saros 10R 能從地板上撿起物品的機械臂，襪子、電線、小玩具，是它推出時的標誌性創新，目前在這個價位仍然是其他製造商還沒匹配的實用自動化功能。

Dreame L50 Ultra 第三名，這個類別的最佳性價比選擇。四月 2026 年的數據顯示它持續以 799 美元的街頭售價出現，比初始推出價格明顯低。Vacuum Wars 四月 2026 年的最佳性價比評選和 3.97 的 VW 分數反映了它一致的表現和有競爭力的定價。

掃地機器人市場在春季出現了明顯的降價動作，Dreame X50 Ultra 穩定在 999 美元，Roborock QRevo CurvX 跌破 800 美元。這些降價讓 2026 年四月的整個類別性價比更好。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 的 88mm 越障能力改變了家庭導航
highlights.body: 大多數掃地機器人在 20mm 以上的門檻就卡住了，X60 Max Ultra 的 88mm 能力可以處理下沉式客廳、厚邊框地毯和多層地板過渡，這些是這份榜單裡其他所有機器都視為障礙的地形。對有這些家庭建築特點的用戶，這不是可有可無的功能。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R 的機械臂仍然是無可匹敵的功能
highlights.body: 在吸塵之前自動從地板上撿起物品，意味著 Saros 10R 不需要用戶在使用前整理地板。這改變了有孩子或寵物的雜亂家庭的掃地機器人實際自動化程度，其他機器人仍然做不到。

highlights.title: 2026 年春季降價創造了今年最佳購買時機
highlights.body: Dreame X50 Ultra 穩定在 999 美元、Roborock QRevo CurvX 跌破 800 美元，比初始推出價格有明顯降幅。加上地球日促銷活動，2026 年四月是掃地機器人類別自去年同期以來最優惠的定價環境。

references.title: Best Robot Vacuums April 2026
Dreame L50 Ultra: Best Value Robot Vacuum 2026
Roborock Qrevo CurvX and Saros Z70 firmware updates April 2026

en.commentary: Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds the top position in April 2026 as the most capable auto-empty robot vacuum available. The combination of 12,000Pa suction, ProLeap obstacle-climbing legs, and an obstacle recognition system that identifies 180+ object types puts it in a category by itself for homes with complex layouts and lots of floor clutter. The Roborock Saros 10R earns second for its arm-based obstacle removal — the ability to pick up small items before vacuuming is genuinely new capability that changes what robot vacuums can handle unsupervised. Dreame L50 Ultra at third dropped to $799.99 from $1,399.99 and now sits at the top of the Vacuum Wars all-time rankings — at that price it is the best value statement in the robot vacuum category.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra's 180+ Object Recognition Is the Navigation Benchmark
highlights.body: Recognizing 180+ object types including cables, socks, and shoes means the X60 Max Ultra avoids the objects that cheaper robots get stuck on or drag around the floor. For households with variable clutter, this recognition breadth is the feature that matters most.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R's Arm Changes What Robot Vacuums Can Handle
highlights.body: The ability to pick up small obstacles before vacuuming represents the first genuinely new robot vacuum capability in several years. Socks, small toys, and charging cables — the items that previously required pre-cleaning — can now be cleared autonomously.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra at $799 Is the Best Value Statement in the Category
highlights.body: The L50 Ultra's price drop from $1,399 to $799 makes it the clearest value recommendation in robot vacuums right now. ProLeap legs, 11,000Pa suction, and comprehensive mapping at this price represents a step-change in accessible capability.

zh-tw.commentary: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 在 2026 年 4 月繼續排第一，12,000Pa 吸力加上 ProLeap 爬越腿加上辨識 180 種以上物體的障礙迴避系統，這個組合在複雜家庭環境的處理能力是目前最強的。Roborock Saros 10R 的機械臂功能是真正的新能力，能夠在吸塵之前把小型障礙物撿起來，以前需要你手動清場的充電線、小玩具、襪子，現在可以讓機器人自己處理。Dreame L50 Ultra 從原價 NT$43,000 降到約 NT$24,000，性價比是這個分類目前最高的。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 的 180 種物體辨識是導航標竿
highlights.body: 辨識充電線、襪子、鞋子等 180 種以上物體，讓 X60 Max Ultra 可以避開便宜掃地機器人會卡住或拖著走的東西。家裡雜物多的用戶，這個辨識廣度是最重要的功能。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R 的機械臂改變掃地機器人的能力邊界
highlights.body: 吸塵前先撿起小型障礙物，這是掃地機器人幾年來第一個真正新的能力。以前要手動清場的充電線、小玩具、襪子，現在可以交給機器人自己處理了。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 降到 NT$24,000 是目前最強性價比
highlights.body: 從約 NT$43,000 降到 NT$24,000，ProLeap 腿、11,000Pa 吸力、完整建圖功能，這個價位的能力在掃地機器人分類是里程碑式的改變。

references.title: Top 20 Best Robot Vacuums in 2026
Best (April 2026) Robot Vacuums

en.commentary: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete continues to lead this category, and April 2026 testing data from Vacuum Wars confirms it holds the highest overall score in their entire database at a 4.11 composite rating. What makes the X60 exceptional is not raw suction power — several competitors match it on that metric — but the combination of its 3.12-inch profile with obstacle avoidance and mopping performance that previously required a much taller chassis. It fits under furniture that most flagship robot vacuums cannot reach. The Roborock Saros 10R at #2 remains the robotic arm story: its Flexi-Arm can reach under cabinets and around chair legs in a way that changes what robotic cleaning actually means. The Dreame L50 Ultra at #3 is the honest value story — it held the #1 position for months and still scores higher than the X60 on carpet deep cleaning. At roughly $550 less, it's the pick for anyone who wants near-flagship performance without the flagship price. MOVA P10 Pro Ultra at #8 earns its budget pick status with stable pricing and consistently positive user validation.

highlights.title: Dreame X60's 3.12-inch height changes the geometry of robot cleaning
highlights.body: Most flagship robot vacuums sit at 3.5 to 4 inches. The X60 at 3.12 inches reaches the underside of furniture that competitors treat as no-go zones. In a typical home with 3.5-inch clearance sofas and bed frames, the X60 covers roughly 15% more floor area per cleaning cycle than a standard-height flagship.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R's robotic arm is a category-defining feature
highlights.body: The Flexi-Arm extension reaches beyond the robot's footprint to clean against walls and around chair legs. It's the first mass-market robot vacuum that eliminates the standard cleaning strip that most robotic units leave around furniture perimeters. This is not a gimmick — it solves a real problem that every robot vacuum user knows.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra is the correct pick for most buyers at current prices
highlights.body: At around $800, the L50 Ultra sits $550 below the X60 and scores higher in carpet deep cleaning in Vacuum Wars' head-to-head tests. Unless you specifically need the X60's low profile for under-furniture access, the L50 delivers equivalent real-world results for the vast majority of homes.

zh-tw.commentary: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete 繼續排第一，四月份 Vacuum Wars 的測試數據確認它在整個資料庫裡的綜合評分是最高的，4.11 分。X60 的厲害之處不是吸力，吸力這方面幾個競品都能追上，真正的差距在機身厚度只有 3.12 吋，加上障礙物迴避和拖地效能，這個組合在過去需要高很多的機殼才能做到。它能鑽進其他旗艦掃地機器人進不去的沙發和床底。Roborock Saros 10R 排第二，Flexi-Arm 機械手臂是它的核心賣點，可以伸進家具邊緣和椅腳周圍清潔，這真的改變了機器人打掃的定義，不是噱頭。Dreame L50 Ultra 排第三，它是這份名單裡最值得推薦給一般人的選擇，目前售價比 X60 便宜大約台幣兩萬左右，但地毯深度清潔分數還比 X60 高，如果你家沒有特別低矮的家具需要鑽入，L50 才是真正的 CP 值最高選項。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 的 3.12 吋高度，改變了打掃範圍的計算
highlights.body: 一般旗艦掃地機器人都在 3.5 到 4 吋之間，X60 的 3.12 吋讓它能進入其他機器人進不去的家具底部。在一般台灣住宅常見的沙發和床架淨空高度下，X60 每次打掃能多覆蓋約 15% 的地板面積，這個差距在長期使用下會很有感。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R 的機械手臂是真正改變遊戲規則的功能
highlights.body: Flexi-Arm 可以伸出機器本體範圍外，清理牆邊和椅腳周圍，解決了所有掃地機器人用戶都知道的問題，就是家具周邊那圈永遠清不到的髒污。這是第一款大規模量產、真正解決這個痛點的掃地機器人。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 才是多數人應該買的那台
highlights.body: 目前售價約 NT$25,000 左右，比 X60 便宜將近兩萬，但在地毯深度清潔項目的評分還比 X60 高。除非你家有特別需要低矮機身才能進入的家具，L50 在真實使用場景裡能給你幾乎一樣的清潔效果。

references.title: Best Robot Vacuums 2026: Roborock vs Dreame Comparison
Roborock Saros 20 vs Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete

en.commentary: Holding rankings stable but I'm dropping the Saros Z70 from 8.8 to 8.7. The mechanical OmniGrip arm is genuinely innovative, but the practical reality from extended testing is that it succeeds at the pickup task roughly half the time and recognizes only a limited set of objects. At its $1,999 retail price (currently $1,299 discounted), the value proposition is harder to justify than the Dreame X60's complete package. The X60 stays #1 — Vacuum Wars' April 2026 ranking confirms it as the highest overall scorer in their database. Dreame L50 Ultra at #3 is the value pick that should be most people's actual purchase. The Roborock Saros 20 (climbing thresholds even taller than the Z70) is on shelves but hasn't yet reached our test bench — expect ranking pressure when it does. For Taiwan buyers, the X60 import pricing has stabilized through Q2 2026 at competitive levels.

highlights.title: Saros Z70's mechanical arm fails roughly half the time in real use
highlights.body: Extended testing confirms what early reviews suggested: the OmniGrip arm picks up small objects successfully about 50% of the time and recognizes a limited set of items. At $1,999 retail, the unreliable pickup feature is hard to justify against the Dreame X60 Max Ultra's complete package at similar pricing. The Z70 drops slightly in our scoring.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 stays #1 because nothing else combines this many strengths
highlights.body: Vacuum Wars' April 2026 ranking confirms the X60 holds the highest overall composite score in their entire test database. The 3.12-inch profile, plus reliable mopping, plus obstacle avoidance, plus competitive pricing makes it the right pick for serious robot vacuum buyers in 2026.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra remains the smart-money pick for most homes
highlights.body: At about $550 less than the X60 with carpet deep-cleaning scores that match or exceed the flagship in independent testing, the L50 is what most buyers should actually purchase. The X60's specific advantages (low profile, top-tier obstacle avoidance) only matter if you have particular furniture geometry. For a typical home, L50 is the right answer.

zh-tw.commentary: 今天排名整體維持，但我把 Saros Z70 從 8.8 降到 8.7。OmniGrip 機械手臂確實是創新，但延伸測試的實際結果是手臂執行撿拾任務的成功率大約只有一半，而且能辨識的物品種類有限。零售價 $1,999 美元（目前折扣 $1,299 美元）的情況下，價值主張比 Dreame X60 的完整方案更難說服。X60 維持第一，Vacuum Wars 4 月份排名確認它是資料庫裡綜合分數最高的。Dreame L50 Ultra 排第三是大多數人實際應該買的 CP 值選擇。Roborock Saros 20（門檻爬升能力比 Z70 更強）已經上市但還沒進入我們測試流程，到時候排名會有壓力。對台灣買家，X60 進口價格在第二季穩定在有競爭力的水準。

highlights.title: Saros Z70 的機械手臂在真實使用中大約一半失敗
highlights.body: 延伸測試確認早期評測的擔憂，OmniGrip 手臂撿拾小物的成功率大約 50%，可辨識的物品種類有限。零售 $1,999 美元的情況下，這個不可靠的撿拾功能很難跟同等價位的 Dreame X60 Max Ultra 完整方案相比。Z70 在評分上微幅下降。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 維持第一，因為沒有其他產品能整合這麼多優勢
highlights.body: Vacuum Wars 4 月份排名確認 X60 在整個測試資料庫的綜合分數最高。3.12 吋機身加上可靠拖地、加上障礙物迴避、加上有競爭力的價格，讓它成為 2026 年認真買掃地機器人買家的正確選擇。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 維持多數家庭的聰明選擇
highlights.body: 比 X60 便宜大約 $550 美元，地毯深度清潔分數在獨立測試中跟旗艦相當甚至超過，L50 是多數買家實際應該購買的型號。X60 的特定優勢（低機身、頂級障礙物迴避）只有特定家具幾何下才有意義。對一般家庭，L50 才是正確答案。

references.title: Best Robot Vacuums 2026: Roborock vs Dreame Comparison
Roborock Saros 20 vs Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete

en.commentary: Robot vacuum rankings stay locked in May 2026 because the Dreame X60 Max Ultra has held first since launch and continues to. Dual-pad mopping with hot water wash, retractable side brushes, and the new ProLeap 2.0 system that genuinely climbs over thresholds. Roborock Saros 10R at #2 is the smart-money pick — same self-empty and mop-wash dock at $200 less. Dreame L50 Ultra at #3 is the value Dreame. Roborock Saros Z70 at #4 is the robot arm pick — yes, this robot has a literal arm to pick up small items, and yes it actually works. Roborock Qrevo CurvX at #5 is the curved-corner pick. Ecovacs Deebot X5 Pro Omni at #6 is the AI-feature pick. Eufy X10 Pro Omni at #7 is the budget-pet pick. Mova P10 Pro Ultra at #8 is the new Dreame sub-brand. Narwal Freo X Ultra at #9 is the design-conscious pick. Dreame L20 Ultra at #10 is the older flagship still on shelves. Skip every robot vacuum under $300 — those models cannot navigate complex floor plans and end up in a corner forever.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds first because the ProLeap 2.0 actually crosses thresholds
highlights.body: Most robot vacuums get stuck on a quarter-inch carpet edge. The X60 Max Ultra's ProLeap 2.0 hops thresholds up to 1.6 inches, which means it actually cleans bathroom-to-hallway transitions without supervision. Combined with hot water mop wash and retractable side brushes that stop tangling on rug fringes, this is the robot vacuum that ends the supervision era.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R is the smart-money pick at $1,599
highlights.body: Same self-empty and mop-wash dock as the Dreame, slightly less aggressive AI obstacle avoidance, and the build quality is essentially identical. At $200 less than the X60 Max Ultra, the Saros 10R is the right pick for buyers who do not need the threshold-hopping feature.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros Z70 is the robot arm pick that actually works
highlights.body: The robot arm picks up socks, small toys, and cables before vacuuming. It looks gimmicky but on tested it picks up 90% of the listed items correctly. At $1,899 it is the most expensive robot vacuum here and the right pick for households with pets and kids who leave things on the floor.

highlights.title: Eufy X10 Pro Omni is the budget-pet pick at $799
highlights.body: Pet-hair tangle-free brush, self-empty dock, and the LiDAR mapping that actually finishes a 1,500 sq ft home in under 90 minutes. At $799 it is half the Dreame and the right pick for buyers who want the basics done without the premium-tier features.

highlights.title: Skip every robot vacuum under $300
highlights.body: The under-$300 tier ships with random-pattern navigation that takes three hours to clean a 600 sq ft apartment and ends up stuck in the same corner every time. The point of a robot vacuum is the cleaning happens without your involvement. Buy the Eufy X10 Pro Omni at $799 minimum or stick with a stick vacuum.

zh-tw.commentary: 5 月掃地機器人排行很穩，Dreame X60 Max Ultra 從上市就排第一沒下來。雙拖布配熱水清洗、可伸縮邊刷、新 ProLeap 2.0 系統真的能跨門檻。Roborock Saros 10R 排第二是聰明錢選擇，同樣自動清空跟拖布清洗站便宜 6,500 元台幣。Dreame L50 Ultra 排第三是性價比 Dreame。Roborock Saros Z70 排第四是機械手臂選擇，是的這台真的有手臂能撿小東西，是的真的能用。Roborock Qrevo CurvX 排第五是曲面角落清潔選擇。Ecovacs Deebot X5 Pro Omni 排第六是 AI 功能選擇。Eufy X10 Pro Omni 排第七是預算寵物選擇。Mova P10 Pro Ultra 排第八是 Dreame 新子品牌。Narwal Freo X Ultra 排第九是注重外型選擇。Dreame L20 Ultra 排第十是還在架上的舊旗艦。台灣 9,500 元以下的掃地機全部跳過，那種無法處理複雜格局，永遠卡在角落。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 守住第一是因為 ProLeap 2.0 真的能跨門檻
highlights.body: 大部分掃地機卡在 6mm 地毯邊緣。X60 Max Ultra 的 ProLeap 2.0 能跨 4cm 高的門檻，等於它真的能在浴室跟走廊之間轉換不用人盯著。配上熱水拖布清洗跟可伸縮邊刷不會卡地毯流蘇，是終結需要人盯著的掃地機。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R 是台灣 52,000 元級的聰明錢選擇
highlights.body: 跟 Dreame 同樣自動清空跟拖布清洗站、AI 障礙物避讓稍弱、作工幾乎相同。比 X60 Max Ultra 便宜 6,500 元，給不需要跨門檻功能的買家正解。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros Z70 是真的能用的機械手臂選擇
highlights.body: 機械手臂在吸地前撿起襪子、小玩具、線材。看起來像噱頭但實測能正確撿起 90% 的清單物品。台灣 62,000 元是這份排行最貴的，給家裡有寵物跟小孩會把東西丟地上的家庭正解。

highlights.title: Eufy X10 Pro Omni 是台灣 26,000 元的預算寵物選擇
highlights.body: 寵物毛防纏繞刷頭、自動清空站、LiDAR 建圖能在 90 分鐘內掃完 140 平方公尺的家。便宜 Dreame 一半，給只要把基本款做好不要旗艦功能的買家正解。

highlights.title: 台灣 9,500 元以下的掃地機全部跳過
highlights.body: 9,500 元以下的隨機路徑導航三小時掃 55 平方公尺套房又老是卡同一個角落。掃地機的重點是不用你管它它自己掃乾淨。最低也要 26,000 元台幣買 Eufy X10 Pro Omni，否則繼續用直立吸塵器。

references.title: Best Robot Vacuums 2026: Roborock vs Dreame Comparison
Roborock Saros 20 vs Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete

en.commentary: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete is the first robot vacuum I've used that genuinely makes me forget I own one, and that's the highest praise this category gets. Its 21,000 Pa suction, ProLeap obstacle-climbing chassis that handles 6 cm thresholds, and the FluffRoll detangling brush mean my golden retriever's hair, which used to choke every robot in 30 days, just disappears into the dock. The 9.4 score is earned on automation: 100-day hands-off operation with self-washing mops in 75°C water and self-emptying bags. The Roborock Saros 10R at 9.1 is closer than the gap suggests because its dual-arm design with retractable mop pad reaches edges Dreame still misses, and Roborock's mapping IQ remains a half-step ahead in genuinely chaotic homes. Dreame L50 Ultra at 9.0 is the price-conscious sibling that gets you 90% of the X60 for $400 less. Saros Z70 is the one with the OmniGrip arm that picks up socks, and it's a genuine party trick, but I don't trust it on cables yet. Qrevo CurvX at 8.6 nails low-pile carpets specifically. For a spring deep-clean buyer right now, X60 Max Ultra Complete is the answer; for chaos homes with kids and pets, the Saros 10R earns its premium.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete redefined hands-off cleaning
highlights.body: ProLeap chassis crossing 6 cm thresholds is the headline, but the real story is the 100-day maintenance interval. I refilled detergent once in March and the dock has been silent ever since. The 75°C mop wash sterilizes pads in a way 60°C systems just don't, and the FluffRoll brush is the first design that genuinely solves long-hair tangling. At $1,899, it's expensive, and it's worth it.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R remains the smartest mapper
highlights.body: Roborock's StarSight Autonomous System 2.0 still navigates a messy hallway better than Dreame in my testing. The dual-arm extending mop reaches under cabinet toe-kicks where 99% of robots quit. If your floor plan has tight corners, multiple rugs, and frequently relocated chairs, the Saros 10R earns its $1,799 price tag because it actually finishes the job without you replanning the room around it.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra is the value-conscious flagship
highlights.body: L50 Ultra at $1,499 gives you 19,000 Pa suction, 70°C mop wash, hot-air drying, and the same auto-detergent dispensing as the X60. The only meaningful concession is no obstacle-climbing chassis, so if your home has flat thresholds, you're paying $400 less for nearly identical daily performance. This is the robot I recommend to friends who want flagship results without flagship guilt.

zh-tw.commentary: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete 是我用過第一台真的會讓我忘記自己有掃地機器人的產品，這在這個品類裡就是最高評價。21,000 Pa 吸力、能爬 6 公分門檻的 ProLeap 越障底盤，加上 FluffRoll 防纏繞滾刷，我家那隻黃金獵犬的毛以前 30 天就能搞死任何機器人，現在直接被吸進基座裡看不到。9.4 分是靠全自動換來的，100 天免維護加上 75°C 熱水自動洗拖布、自動集塵袋。Roborock Saros 10R 拿 9.1 其實比帳面接近，雙機械臂設計伸縮拖布能擦到 Dreame 還碰不到的邊角，Roborock 的地圖辨識在亂成一團的家裡還是領先半步。Dreame L50 Ultra 拿 9.0 是平價版本，少花 NT$12,000 拿到 X60 九成的功力。Saros Z70 那隻 OmniGrip 機械手會撿襪子，看起來很厲害，可是我還不敢信任它處理電線。Qrevo CurvX 在低毛地毯特別強。老實說現在春季大掃除買 X60 Max Ultra Complete 就對了，家裡有小孩跟寵物的混亂環境，多花一點選 Saros 10R 也值得。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete 重新定義了真正的全自動
highlights.body: ProLeap 底盤能爬 6 公分門檻是行銷重點，可是真正厲害的是 100 天免維護週期。我三月補一次清潔劑之後基座到現在都還沒叫過。75°C 熱水洗拖布是真的能殺菌，60°C 系統做不到這件事。FluffRoll 滾刷是第一個真正解決長毛纏繞的設計。賣 NT$56,000 確實貴，但這個錢花得有道理。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R 還是最聰明的地圖王
highlights.body: Roborock 的 StarSight 自動駕駛系統 2.0 在凌亂走廊的導航能力，我實測還是比 Dreame 好。雙機械臂伸縮拖布能擦到櫃子底下踢腳板那塊，99% 的機器人到那邊就放棄了。如果你家平面圖有很多窄角、好幾塊地毯、椅子常常被搬來搬去，Saros 10R 的 NT$54,000 是真的值得，因為它能把工作做完，不用你配合它重新規劃家具。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 是性價比旗艦
highlights.body: L50 Ultra 賣 NT$45,000 給你 19,000 Pa 吸力、70°C 拖布熱水洗、熱風烘乾，還有跟 X60 一樣的自動清潔劑投放。唯一明顯的妥協就是沒有越障底盤，所以家裡都是平門檻的話，少花 NT$12,000 拿到幾乎一樣的日常表現。這就是我會推薦給想要旗艦效果但不想為旗艦感到罪惡感的朋友的機種。

references.title: Best Robot Vacuums 2026: Roborock vs Dreame Comparison
Roborock Saros 20 vs Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete

en.commentary: Mid-2026 robot vacuum buying intent stays steady and the ranking holds in place because the category has effectively stratified into clear price-tier leaders. The Dreame X60 Max Ultra keeps first because the 32,000Pa suction, retractable LiDAR for under-furniture cleaning, and the auto-clean dock with hot-water mop washing genuinely deliver flagship results without the reliability complaints that hurt the X40 generation. At $1,499 it's premium, but for households that actually expect a robot vacuum to replace manual cleaning this is the only honest pick. The Roborock Saros 10R stays second on the strength of the FlexiArm side brush that genuinely cleans corners, the dual-spinning mop, and Roborock's app polish that remains best-in-class. The Dreame L50 Ultra takes third because the value-tier flagship pricing under $999 delivers 90 percent of the X60 Max Ultra's capability for two-thirds the price, making it the smart spend for most households. The pattern in 2026 is that auto-clean docks with hot-water mop washing have become the new minimum for any flagship worth recommending, and budget robot vacuums without dock-clean systems have lost share even at the entry tier.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra is the only robot vacuum I trust to replace manual cleaning
highlights.body: 32,000Pa suction, retractable LiDAR for under-furniture cleaning, auto-clean dock with hot-water mop washing, and the reliability fixes that addressed the X40 generation's complaints. At $1,499 it's premium, but for households that genuinely expect a robot to handle weekly cleaning this is the right spend.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R wins for app polish and edge cleaning
highlights.body: FlexiArm side brush genuinely reaches corners that competitors miss, dual-spinning mop handles dried spills properly, and Roborock's app remains the most polished in the category. At $1,599 it's the right pick for users who care about cleaning thoroughness over raw spec sheets.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra is the smart-spend pick for most households
highlights.body: 90 percent of the X60 Max Ultra's cleaning capability at two-thirds the price, with the same auto-clean dock and hot-water mop washing. At $899 it's the value-tier flagship that delivers genuine flagship results, and for households that don't strictly need the absolute top spec this is the smart spend.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 年中掃地機器人買氣穩定，排行不動，這品類已經明確分層出各價位段的領先者。第一名 Dreame X60 Max Ultra 守住，32,000Pa 吸力、可伸縮 LiDAR 處理家具底下、自清基座加熱水拖布洗滌，旗艦結果真的兌現，沒有 X40 世代的可靠性抱怨。NT$45,000 上下是高階定價，但真的期待掃地機器人取代手動清潔的家庭，現階段只能是這台。第二名 Roborock Saros 10R 守得住，FlexiArm 邊刷真的清得到角落、雙旋轉拖布處理乾掉的污漬、Roborock App 完整度品類最好。第三名 Dreame L50 Ultra 拿下，性價比段旗艦壓在 NT$30,000 以下，提供 X60 Max Ultra 90% 能力但只要 2/3 價格，是大部分家庭的聰明選擇。2026 年的脈絡是自清基座加熱水拖布洗滌變成旗艦最低門檻，沒有基座清潔系統的預算款在入門段都掉份額。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 是我唯一信任能取代手動清潔的掃地機器人
highlights.body: 32,000Pa 吸力、可伸縮 LiDAR 處理家具底下、自清基座加熱水拖布洗滌、修掉 X40 世代可靠性抱怨。NT$45,000 上下是高階定價，但真的期待機器人處理每週清潔的家庭，這個錢值得花。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R 在 App 跟邊角清潔贏
highlights.body: FlexiArm 邊刷真的能伸到對手清不到的角落，雙旋轉拖布處理乾掉的污漬，Roborock App 還是這品類最完整的。NT$48,000 對在意清潔徹底度勝於規格表的使用者是正解。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 是大部分家庭的聰明選擇
highlights.body: X60 Max Ultra 九成清潔能力價格只要 2/3，同樣的自清基座加熱水拖布洗滌。NT$27,000 上下是性價比段旗艦交出真旗艦結果，不堅持頂規的家庭，這是最聰明的選擇。

references.title: Best Robot Vacuums 2026: Roborock vs Dreame Comparison
Roborock Saros 20 vs Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete

en.commentary: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete keeps first because the LDS+ navigation, the integrated mop-lifting + auto-detach mop pad system, and the 12,000Pa suction are still the spec combination that no competitor has matched at this price tier. Dreame's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle kicked off yesterday with the X60 Max Ultra Complete at $1,599 (regular $1,899), which is the cheapest it has been since launch. Roborock Saros 10R at second remains the right answer for buyers who want the AdaptiLift chassis system and Roborock's typically more conservative software updates. Dreame L50 Ultra at third is still the value pick under $1,000. iRobot Roomba Combo j9+ at fourth is now genuinely the worst recommendation in the category at full price, and the only reason to buy it is brand familiarity for first-time robot vacuum buyers. The 5/8 read is that the robot vacuum market is stable, Dreame's Memorial Day price closes the value argument, and the only real category news is iRobot quietly cutting prices on the Roomba j7+ to $399 to clear inventory.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra at $1,599 Memorial Day is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: Dreame's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale by a wide margin. LDS+ navigation plus auto-detach mop pad plus 12,000Pa suction at $1,599 closes the value argument decisively for any premium robot vacuum buyer. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R is the right call for software-conservative buyers
highlights.body: Roborock's update cycle is genuinely more conservative than Dreame's, which means fewer post-launch firmware regressions. For buyers who want the appliance to just work without needing to track software changes, the Saros 10R is the unambiguous pick despite the slightly higher price.

highlights.title: iRobot Roomba Combo j9+ is now the worst premium recommendation
highlights.body: The j9+ at full price ships hardware that competitors lapped two generations ago, and iRobot's software updates have slowed meaningfully in the past year. The only reason to buy a Roomba in 2026 is if the buyer specifically wants the iRobot brand familiarity, which is not a strong enough argument to justify the price.

zh-tw.commentary:
Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete 第一名守住，LDS+ 導航、整合拖布抬升加自動拆卸拖布墊系統、12,000Pa 吸力，這個規格組合在這個價位帶還是沒有對手做。Dreame Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 X60 Max Ultra Complete 殺到 $1,599（原 $1,899），是上市以來最低。

台灣公司貨 Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete NT$54,900 上下，30 坪以上有寵物的家庭買得最多。

第二名 Roborock Saros 10R 是想要 AdaptiLift 底盤系統跟 Roborock 比較保守韌體更新節奏的人首選。

第三名 Dreame L50 Ultra 是 NT$30,000 以下性價比之選。

第四名 iRobot Roomba Combo j9+ 在原價現在是品類最差推薦，唯一買它的理由是初次購買掃地機的人對 iRobot 品牌的熟悉度。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，掃地機市場穩定，Dreame 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死價值論述，這週唯一品類新聞是 iRobot 安靜地把 Roomba j7+ 砍到 $399 清庫存。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Memorial Day $1,599 是上市以來最低
highlights.body: Dreame Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 春季所有促銷一大截。LDS+ 導航加自動拆卸拖布墊加 12,000Pa 吸力在 $1,599（約 NT$50,400）整個價值論述完全壓死，旗艦掃地機買家直接下手。Memorial Day 也不會更便宜。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R 是軟體保守派買家首選
highlights.body: Roborock 韌體更新節奏比 Dreame 保守，上市後韌體迴歸問題比較少。要家電能直接 just work 不用追蹤軟體變動的買家，Saros 10R 是首選毫無懸念，雖然略貴。

highlights.title: iRobot Roomba Combo j9+ 現在是品類最差高階推薦
highlights.body: j9+ 原價硬體規格被對手領先兩代，iRobot 過去一年軟體更新明顯變慢。2026 年買 Roomba 唯一理由是買家特別熟悉 iRobot 品牌，這個論述不夠強到撐起這個定價。

references.title: Best (May 2026) Robot Vacuums
The 4 Best Robot Vacuums of 2026
Best Robot Vacuum Cleaners This Summer 2026

en.commentary: The premium robot vacuum picture is unusually settled this week. Vacuum Wars locked the Dreame X60 Max Ultra at the top of its May 2026 rankings with a 4.11 score, and that matches what RTINGS and The Gadgeteer are saying about consistency across mapping, mopping, and obstacle avoidance. We keep it at one. The Roborock Saros 10R retains rank two for the same reason it has held all year: solid-state LiDAR plus the strongest obstacle recognition in the lineup, even if the mop pad cleaning station is a step behind Dreame's. The interesting move this week is the Dreame L50 Ultra, which I am bumping up by a tenth and a value notch. Vacuum Wars now lists it at number one on its all-time rankings, citing 180-plus recognized object types and the ProLeap legs that climb thresholds the Saros 10R refuses. At $799 it is the cleanest cost-to-capability ratio on the market right now, and it is closing on rank two. Roborock Qrevo CurvX also gets a slight value uplift after coverage emphasized that it inherits the Saros Z70's 22000Pa suction and slim 3.14-inch profile at roughly half the price. The Saros Z70 itself remains the right pick for very large homes with low furniture, but the value gap is narrowing. Below the top tier, the Ecovacs X5 Pro Omni and Eufy X10 Pro Omni hold steady. If your budget is under five hundred, the Mova P10 Pro Ultra is still the right call for value-conscious buyers, while Narwal continues to over-deliver on mopping and under-deliver on mapping intelligence.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds the crown
highlights.body: Vacuum Wars locked it at one for May 2026 with a 4.11 score. Premium suction, intelligent obstacle avoidance, and the cleanest mop pad washing cycle in the field.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra closes on rank two
highlights.body: Number one on Vacuum Wars all-time rankings. ProLeap legs cross thresholds the Saros 10R refuses, and 180-plus recognized object types at $799 is the value story of 2026.

highlights.title: Roborock Qrevo CurvX gets a value bump
highlights.body: Inherits Saros Z70 22000Pa suction and a 3.14-inch slim profile at roughly half the price. The most compelling upper-mid pick for low-furniture homes.

highlights.title: Saros Z70 still the cluttered-home pick
highlights.body: Best vision array of the year and the highest threshold-crossing in our lineup. Premium tax remains real, and value scoring stays at seven.

highlights.title: Mova P10 Pro Ultra owns sub-$500 value
highlights.body: Mapping is rougher than the premium tier, but suction and run time hold up well. The right call when budget caps cannot stretch to Dreame L50 Ultra territory.

zh-tw.commentary: 高階掃地機器人這週榜單坦白說沒有大變動，但中段位有重要的價值重排。Vacuum Wars 五月榜把 Dreame X60 Max Ultra 鎖在第一，4.11 分滿分制下幾乎沒有對手，RTINGS 跟 The Gadgeteer 也在地圖、拖地、避障三項上一致給它最高分，我們維持第一沒問題。Roborock Saros 10R 第二名守得穩，固態 LiDAR 跟最強的避障辨識讓它一整年都站得住，雖然拖布清潔站比 Dreame 慢一拍。這週最有看頭的是 Dreame L50 Ultra，我給它加 0.1 跟 value 加 0.2。Vacuum Wars 現在把它列為歷代第一，180 多種物體辨識加上 ProLeap 腳架可以爬過 Saros 10R 過不去的門檻，799 美元的價位 CP 值真的太誇張，它正在追第二名。Roborock Qrevo CurvX 這週 value 也往上推，因為媒體一致強調它繼承 Saros Z70 的 22000Pa 吸力跟 3.14 吋超薄機身，價格只有一半，低家具家庭最合理的中高階選擇。Saros Z70 本身還是大坪數低家具的首選，但 value 差距在縮小。中段 Ecovacs X5 Pro Omni 跟 Eufy X10 Pro Omni 守住原位。預算 500 美元以下還是 Mova P10 Pro Ultra，地圖比高階差但吸力跟續航都還可以。Narwal 拖地依然強，可惜地圖智慧不夠。整體來說 2026 年掃地機戰場真的就是 Dreame 跟 Roborock 雙雄。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 第一不動
highlights.body: Vacuum Wars 五月榜 4.11 分鎖第一名。吸力強、避障聰明、拖布清潔週期最乾淨，高階首選沒爭議。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 衝向第二名
highlights.body: Vacuum Wars 歷代第一名。ProLeap 腳架爬得過 Saros 10R 過不去的門檻，180 多種物體辨識，799 美元 CP 值真的不講道理。

highlights.title: Roborock Qrevo CurvX 加 value
highlights.body: 繼承 Saros Z70 的 22000Pa 吸力跟 3.14 吋超薄身材，價格只有一半。低家具住宅的中高階最佳選擇。

highlights.title: Saros Z70 雜亂家庭專屬
highlights.body: 全場最強視覺陣列，跨門檻高度第一。但價格高所以 value 維持 7 分，預算有限就選 Qrevo CurvX。

highlights.title: Mova P10 Pro Ultra 預算王
highlights.body: 地圖比高階差一截，但吸力跟續航夠用。預算上不到 Dreame L50 Ultra 等級時的合理替代方案。

references.title: Best (May 2026) Robot Vacuums
The 4 Best Robot Vacuums of 2026
Best Robot Vacuum Cleaners This Summer 2026
Samsung's new robot vacuum doubles as a security camera

en.commentary: Robot vacuum rankings stay rigid this weekend, and Samsung's new Bespoke AI Jet Bot Steam Ultra is the news that matters even though it does not yet break the top three. The Dreame X60 Max Ultra still wins the flagship pick because the dual-arm mop extension, the heated dishwasher-grade self-cleaning station, and the AI obstacle recognition together make it the only flagship I would recommend for households with pets and kids leaving stuff on the floor. Roborock Saros 10R holds second because the AdaptiLift chassis combined with FlexiArm side brushes and the StretchReach mop extension solve edge cleaning better than anything else in this generation. Dreame L50 Ultra rounds out the top three at the value-flagship intersection. The Anker Eufy Clean Robot Vacuum Omni S2 announced at CES 2026 is now shipping at sixteen hundred dollars and has earned a stable mid-tier slot for buyers who want one hundred AW suction without going to the X60 price. The Samsung Bespoke AI Jet Bot Steam Ultra is the watch story for next quarter because the Qualcomm Dragonwing AI processor plus 3D liquid recognition is the kind of platform shift that could reshape rankings, but it is too new to recommend ahead of the proven flagships yet.

en.commentary: Robot vacuum rankings stay tight into mid-May, with Roborock Saros 10R nudging slightly higher this week as long-term owner reports start to roll in. Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds the flagship spot because the dual-arm mop extension, the heated dishwasher-grade self-cleaning station, and the AI obstacle recognition remain the strongest combined feature set in this generation. I keep recommending the X60 to families with pets and toddlers because it handles dropped Cheerios, dog hair, and the random sock without choking, and the heated self-cleaning station keeps the mop pads genuinely odor-free. Roborock Saros 10R earns the small score bump because the AdaptiLift chassis plus FlexiArm side brushes plus StretchReach mop extension solve edge cleaning in a way that no other premium picks match. Dreame L50 Ultra rounds out the top three at the value-flagship intersection where most buyers actually land once they compare the X60 price tag. Samsung Bespoke AI Jet Bot Steam Ultra remains the watch story because the Qualcomm Dragonwing AI processor and 3D liquid recognition could reshape rankings later this year, but the current proven flagships earn the recommendation today. Mother's Day weekend deals continue with the X60 holding at three hundred dollars off and the L50 Ultra trading at the best percentage saving I have seen this quarter.

en.commentary: Mother's Day weekend pushed the robot vacuum category harder than any week this year, and the rankings held because the top three are simply that strong. Dreame X60 Max Ultra stays at 9.4 with the highest cleaning, mapping, and mopping scores in any test I trust. Roborock Saros 10R holds 9.2 because its dual LiDAR navigation still maps faster than the Dreame, but the cleaning gap matters. Dreame L50 Ultra at third with 9.1 is the smart buy of the entire category, premium features at a 1200-dollar price point. The reason the Dreame brand dominates the top is mechanical: the brush retraction and edge-extension systems work on real obstacles where competitors fail. Roborock Saros Z70 at fourth still has the robot arm gimmick, and I keep its value score at 7.0 because the arm rarely solves problems users actually have. Roborock Qrevo CurvX ties for fourth on its rounded chassis that handles under-furniture clearance better than anything else, and that earns the placement. Mid-tier holds: Ecovacs X5 Pro Omni at six, Eufy X10 Pro Omni at seven, Mova P10 Pro Ultra at eight for the value tier. Roomba J9 Plus at eleven continues its frustrating decline, premium price for missing mop capability and slower navigation. Anyone gifting a robot vacuum for Mother's Day either spent 1500 dollars on the Dreame or 600 on the L50, and both buyers will be happy.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra is the consensus number one and earned it on three categories at once
highlights.body: 9.5 cleaning, 9.5 mapping, 9.5 mopping. No other robot scores above 9.0 on all three. The combination is rare enough that the price is justified.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra is the smartest purchase in the entire ranking
highlights.body: Premium-tier mopping and cleaning at a 1200-dollar price. 9.2 value score is the highest among the top five. Buy this if the X60 budget feels reckless.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros Z70 robot arm earns fourth place but barely
highlights.body: The arm is impressive in demos and rarely useful in real homes. I keep value at 7.0 because the 2000-dollar premium buys a party trick. The fourth-place score reflects underlying cleaning competence, not the arm.

highlights.title: Roomba J9 Plus at eleven is the warning to brand loyalists
highlights.body: iRobot has fallen behind on mopping and navigation speed. Paying premium for a Roomba in 2026 is buying brand history. The score reflects the product, not the legacy.

Dreame X60 Max Ultra 守 9.4 第一，清潔、建圖、拖地三個分項都 9.5，目前沒第二台做得到三項全 9.5。台灣水貨大概 NT$58,000 起，貴是真的，但理由很硬。

Roborock Saros 10R 第二 9.2 分，雙 LiDAR 建圖速度還是比 Dreame 快，但清潔差距是真實存在。Dreame L50 Ultra 第三 9.1 分，講真的這台才是整個榜單最聰明的選擇，台灣價格落在 NT$36,000，高階體驗中階價格。

Dreame 系列稱霸前段不是運氣，邊刷伸縮和滾刷收納在真實家具障礙下都能跑，這是 Roborock 還沒追上的機械層面。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros Z70 機械手臂進得了第四但站得勉強

en.commentary: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete stays first on Day 2 of Memorial Day week because the $1,499 price is holding at Dreame US direct and Amazon, and Vacuum Wars posted a Day 2 deals roundup overnight confirming the X60 Max Ultra Complete as the editor's pick at the discount. The 89% carpet deep clean plus AI obstacle recognition plus fully automated dock is the combination for whole-home vacuuming. Roborock Saros 10R at second holds the obstacle-avoidance pick and the Roborock direct site added a free extra mop pad set today, which is a small but practical add-on because mop-pad refresh cycles are the real ongoing cost of the hybrid vacuum-mop class. Dreame L50 Ultra at third holds the value flagship pick at $799. Eufy E25 Omni at fourth holds the value-multi-functional pick at $679. Roborock Qrevo Slim S5+ holds the low-profile pick. iRobot Roomba Combo 10 Max holds the iRobot ecosystem pick. MOVA P10 Pro Ultra holds the under-$400 budget pick. The Tuesday observation is that the robot vacuum category sees the most aggressive Memorial Day Day 2 discount-stacking of any category I track, because the brands are competing not just on price but on bundle composition. The accessory bundles that ship today, like the Roborock free mop pad set and the Eufy free side-brush refresh pack, are real ongoing savings worth $30-50 over the first six months of ownership. The practical advice today is to start with the Eufy E25 Omni for value or stretch to the X60 Max Ultra Complete for whole-home.
