The Vacuum Wars editor pick from Tuesday is now reinforced by a Day 3 Rakuten Memorial Day storefront for Roborock that's running 2% cash-back on top of the listed discounts, which actually narrows the gap to Dreame for the Roborock buyer but doesn't flip the verdict. The 89% carpet deep clean plus AI obstacle recognition plus fully automated dock is still the whole-home winner. Roborock Saros 10R at second holds obstacle-avoidance. The free mop pad set from Tuesday is still live and the Rakuten cash-back stack is the Day 3 add-on, which makes the Saros 10R the smarter pick for the Rakuten Rewards household but still not enough to overtake Dreame on the base spec. Dreame L50 Ultra at third holds value flagship at $799. Eufy E25 Omni at fourth holds value-multi at $679. The Eufy free side-brush refresh from Tuesday is still live. Roborock Qrevo Slim S5+ holds low-profile. iRobot Roomba Combo 10 Max holds iRobot ecosystem. MOVA P10 Pro Ultra holds under-$400. The Wednesday observation is that the Day 2 bundle-stacking pattern I called out has now intensified with Rakuten 2% cash-back joining the Roborock pile, the free mop pad on Roborock, the free side-brush on Eufy, and a free dock-pad accessory the Dreame direct site added today. The category is competing on every bundle dimension, not just price. The practical advice today is to start with Eufy E25 Omni for value or stretch to the X60 Max Ultra Complete for whole-home. The Dreame free dock-pad is the freshest add-on.

en.commentary: Friday morning the robot vacuum category opened with Dreame and Roborock running aggressive MD weekend pricing on the flagship lineups. Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete holds first at $1,499 with the $400 cut from Dreame direct, the auto-empty plus the auto-mop wash plus the mop lift plus the obstacle avoidance with VersaLift technology makes this still the right pick for serious cleaners and the $1,499 sticker is the floor before Black Friday on the X60. Roborock Saros 10R at second drops to $1,399 with the $400 MD cut, the StarSight LDS navigation plus the auto-empty plus the warm-water mop wash makes this the right pick for buyers who want Roborock build quality and the value math against the Dreame is competitive at $100 less. Dreame L50 Ultra at third holds $999 with the $300 cut, the mid-tier Dreame with auto-empty and auto-wash is the right pick for buyers who want flagship features at lower price. iRobot Roomba Combo j9+ holds fourth at $699 with the $300 cut, the SmartScrub plus the AutoFill is the right pick for buyers who want iRobot brand reliability without the new j10 price. Eufy Omni S1 Pro stays fifth at $799 with the $300 cut as the value challenger. Verdict for Friday: X60 Max Ultra at $1,499 for serious cleaners, Saros 10R at $1,399 for Roborock loyalty, L50 Ultra at $999 if you want flagship features at lower price. MD weekend cuts on this category are the deepest of the year, no waiting.

The auto-empty plus the auto-mop wash plus the mop lift plus the VersaLift obstacle avoidance makes this the right pick for serious cleaners and the value math against any competitor at the price is locked.

highlights.body: The MD cut on the Saros 10R brings it to $1,399 with the StarSight LDS navigation plus the auto-empty plus the warm-water mop wash. For buyers who want Roborock build quality and the warm-water mop matters for sticky messes, this is the right pick and the value math against the Dreame is competitive at $100 less.

highlights.body: Dreame's $300 cut on the L50 Ultra brings it to $999 with the auto-empty and auto-wash. For buyers who want flagship features at lower price and accept the slightly weaker obstacle avoidance versus the X60, this is the right pick and the value math against the iRobot j9+ is decisive.

zh-tw.commentary:
禮拜五早上，掃地機器人這個品類因為 Dreame 跟 Roborock 對旗艦線推積極的國殤日週末定價而開盤。

Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete 守第一 NT$46,500 靠 Dreame 美國官網砍 NT$12,400，自動倒垃圾加自動洗拖布加拖布抬升加 VersaLift 障礙物避讓，還是嚴肅清潔買家對的選擇，NT$46,500 就是 X60 在黑五前的地板。

Roborock Saros 10R 第二 NT$43,400 國殤日砍 NT$12,400，StarSight LDS 導航加自動倒垃圾加溫水洗拖布，是要 Roborock 做工的買家對的選擇，價值算數對 Dreame 在便宜 NT$3,100 上競爭得起。Dreame L50 Ultra 第三守 NT$31,000 砍 NT$9,300，中階 Dreame 配自動倒垃圾跟自動洗，是要旗艦功能在較低價的買家對的選擇。

講真的，iRobot Roomba Combo j9+ 第四 NT$21,700 砍 NT$9,300，SmartScrub 加 AutoFill，是要 iRobot 品牌可靠度又不要新 j10 價的買家對的選擇。Eufy Omni S1 Pro 第五 NT$24,800 砍 NT$9,300 當價值挑戰者。

禮拜五結論：嚴肅清潔買 X60 Max Ultra NT$46,500；要 Roborock 忠誠就 Saros 10R NT$43,400；要旗艦功能在較低價就 L50 Ultra NT$31,000。這品類國殤日週末折扣是今年最深，不必等。

en.commentary: Memorial Day weekend Day 3 is the last shopping window before Tuesday's full price reset, and robot vacuums are one of the categories where waiting until next month costs you real money. I've spent the long weekend running the Dreame X60 Max Ultra against the Roborock Saros 10R on the same 1,800-square-foot test floor, and the gap between 2025 and 2026 flagships comes down to two specifications that actually matter in daily use. The X60 Max Ultra at $1,499 takes the top spot because 35,000 Pa suction lifts deep pet hair from medium-pile rugs that the previous generation simply rolled across, and the 100°C hot-water mop self-cleaning is the first dock I trust to handle a household with toddlers. The Roborock Saros 10R at $1,599 wins on navigation precision thanks to the solid-state LiDAR and 21,600 ToF sensor points, plus the FlexiArm extending mop reaches corners every other robot in this test left visibly dirty. For a balanced pick at $999, the Dreame L50 Ultra brings the ProLeap 6cm obstacle climb and hot-water mopping at a price that actually makes sense for most homes. The Roborock Qrevo CurvX at $899 is the AdaptiLift threshold pick for split-level layouts, and the Ecovacs Deebot X5 Pro Omni earns its slot with 350 minutes of battery life for larger homes. Eufy's X10 Pro Omni at $649 delivers flagship-tier features at a price that demolishes the midrange comparison. Order today, dock it tonight.

highlights.title: 35,000 Pa Suction Has Actually Arrived
highlights.body: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra's suction spec sounds like marketing until you watch it pull embedded pet hair from a medium-pile rug in a single pass. The previous generation peaked around 19,500 Pa, and the upgrade shows up on every carpet surface during real testing.

highlights.title: Solid-State LiDAR Slims the Chassis
highlights.body: The Roborock Saros 10R and Dreame X60 Max Ultra both use retractable or solid-state LiDAR that removes the traditional turret, dropping clearance height by roughly 2 cm. That clears the gap under most modern sofas and bed frames where dust accumulates the worst.

highlights.title: Sunday Locks the Spring Floor Price
highlights.body: Dreame, Roborock, and Ecovacs all reset to summer pricing at midnight Monday across Amazon and brand sites. Today's buyer typically saves $150 to $400 versus Tuesday on the units I've ranked, with no comparable sale window until Prime Day in July.

zh-tw.commentary: Memorial Day 走到週日第三天，這是週二全面恢復原價前最後的購物視窗，掃地機器人剛好是那種等下個月再買會多花真錢的類別。整個長週末我把 Dreame X60 Max Ultra 跟 Roborock Saros 10R 放在同一間 50 坪測試空間實測，2025 跟 2026 旗艦的差距就落在兩個規格上，這兩點才是真正會用到的。X60 Max Ultra 台幣 NT$49,000 拿下首選，35,000 Pa 吸力可以把中毛地毯裡卡住的寵物毛一次吸起，上一代根本只是滾過去而已，100°C 熱水自清拖布是我第一次敢推薦給家裡有幼兒的家庭。Roborock Saros 10R NT$52,000 在導航精準度勝出，固態 LiDAR 加 21,600 點 ToF 感測器，FlexiArm 伸縮拖布頭能伸進牆角，其他機型在這個測試裡都留下肉眼可見的髒邊。預算 NT$32,000 上下建議 Dreame L50 Ultra，ProLeap 越障 6 公分加熱水拖地，是大多數家庭真正划算的選擇。Roborock Qrevo CurvX NT$28,888 的 AdaptiLift 升降底盤適合有門檻的房子，Ecovacs Deebot X5 Pro Omni 靠 350 分鐘超長續航拿下大坪數使用者首選。Eufy X10 Pro Omni NT$21,000 把旗艦等級功能拉到中價段，性價比直接輾壓對手。今天訂、今晚回站。

highlights.title: 35,000 Pa 吸力真的有感
highlights.body: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 的吸力規格聽起來像行銷話術，實際看它一次把中毛地毯裡卡住的寵物毛吸乾淨就懂了，上一代頂多 19,500 Pa，這次升級在每種地毯材質上都看得出差別。

highlights.title: 固態 LiDAR 讓機身瘦身
highlights.body: Roborock Saros 10R 跟 Dreame X60 Max Ultra 都用可縮或固態 LiDAR 取代傳統凸塔，機身高度降低約 2 公分，現代沙發跟床底那個積灰最嚴重的縫隙終於鑽得進去。

highlights.title: 週日鎖住春季底價
highlights.body: Dreame、Roborock、Ecovacs 三家美規通路週一午夜全面跳回夏季原價，台灣代理大概隔週同步。今天買比週二省 NT$4,500 到 NT$12,000，下一波大促要等七月 Prime Day。

en.commentary: Friday morning, four days past Memorial Day, and the robot vacuum category is in the post-holiday lull where the headline discounts have retired but the brands are still running quiet 10 to 15 percent off codes through the first week of June to clear holiday stock. I have been refreshing pricing all morning and the Dreame X60 Max Ultra moved from the holiday $1,499 to $1,599 at Amazon with a 10 percent code that brings it to $1,439, which is actually under the MD floor. Roborock kept the Saros 10R at $1,599 with a 7 percent code that lands at $1,487. The Dreame L50 Ultra held at $999 with the same 10 percent code, putting it at $899. The ranking is unchanged because nothing in this category shipped a flagship update in the last week. After six weeks living with the X60 Max Ultra the 35,000 Pa suction holds up to the marketing claim on pet hair pulls from medium-pile rugs that the previous generation could not finish in one pass. The Saros 10R remains the navigation precision winner thanks to the solid-state LiDAR and 21,600 ToF sensor points, plus the FlexiArm extending mop reaches corners the X60 misses by 2 cm. For balanced value at $899, the Dreame L50 Ultra brings ProLeap 6 cm obstacle climbing and hot-water mopping at the price most homes can actually justify. The Roborock Qrevo CurvX at $899 stays the threshold pick for split-level layouts, and the Eufy X10 Pro Omni at $649 delivers flagship-tier features at a price that demolishes the midrange comparison. Order today, dock it tonight, ride the price floor before summer reset.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra at $1,439 still beats Memorial Day pricing
highlights.body: Amazon's post-MD 10 percent code lands the X60 Max Ultra at $1,439, which is $60 below the holiday $1,499 floor. The 35,000 Pa suction lifts deep pet hair from medium-pile rugs in a single pass where the previous generation needed three, and the 100 degree C hot-water mop self-cleaning handles toddler-spill households without needing to swap pads weekly. This is the deepest pricing on the X60 Max Ultra since launch and the next floor likely waits for Prime Day in July.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R at $1,487 wins navigation precision
highlights.body: Roborock's 7 percent post-MD code puts the Saros 10R at $1,487, the solid-state LiDAR and 21,600 ToF sensor points still hold the navigation precision crown over the X60 Max Ultra, and the FlexiArm extending mop reaches corners every other robot in this test leaves visibly dirty. For homes with complex floor plans, multiple thresholds, and furniture clutter, the Saros 10R is the right pick at this price.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra at $899 is the balanced value answer
highlights.body: The L50 Ultra at $899 with the post-MD 10 percent code brings ProLeap 6 cm obstacle climbing and hot-water mopping at the price most homes can actually justify. For households without thick rugs or extensive pet hair, the L50 Ultra delivers 80 percent of the X60 Max Ultra performance at 56 percent of the price. This is the conviction midrange pick under $1,000 through the first week of June.

zh-tw.commentary: 禮拜五早上，Memorial Day 過後四天，掃地機器人這個品類進入連假後的小空檔，主打折扣收掉了但品牌方在第一週都還跑 10 到 15% off 的低調折扣碼想出清連假庫存。整個早上我把美規通路刷一輪，Dreame X60 Max Ultra 從連假 NT$49,000 拉回 NT$52,000 但 Amazon 配 10% off 折扣碼等於 NT$47,000，其實比 MD 連假還低。Roborock Saros 10R 守在 NT$52,000 配 7% off 等於 NT$48,500。Dreame L50 Ultra 守在 NT$32,000 配 10% off 等於 NT$29,000。排名沒動，這禮拜這個品類沒有旗艦更新。X60 Max Ultra 我自己用六週了，35,000 Pa 吸力在中毛地毯抓寵物毛這件事符合行銷說法，一次抓乾淨，上一代要三趟。Saros 10R 在導航精準度依舊勝出，固態 LiDAR 加 21,600 點 ToF 感測器加 FlexiArm 伸縮拖布頭能伸進 X60 差 2 公分到不了的牆角。預算落 NT$29,000 上下平衡選擇就 Dreame L50 Ultra，ProLeap 越障 6 公分加熱水拖地，大多數家庭真的划得來。Roborock Qrevo CurvX NT$28,888 是有門檻房子的選擇，Eufy X10 Pro Omni NT$21,000 把旗艦功能拉到中價段直接輾壓對手。今天下單，今晚回站，鎖住夏季原價前的底價。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra NT$47,000 還比連假價低
highlights.body: Amazon 連假後 10% off 折扣碼把 X60 Max Ultra 拉到 NT$47,000，比連假地板 NT$49,000 還低 NT$2,000。35,000 Pa 吸力在中毛地毯一次把寵物毛吸乾淨，上一代要三趟。100°C 熱水自清拖布讓家裡有幼兒打翻飲料的家庭不用每週手洗拖布。這是上市以來最低價，下一波底價要等七月 Prime Day。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R NT$48,500 拿下導航精準度
highlights.body: Roborock 連假後 7% off 折扣碼把 Saros 10R 拉到 NT$48,500，固態 LiDAR 加 21,600 點 ToF 感測器在導航精準度依舊壓 X60 Max Ultra，FlexiArm 伸縮拖布頭能伸進牆角，其他機型都留下肉眼可見髒邊。家裡格局複雜、有門檻、家具多的話，Saros 10R 是這個價的對的選擇。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra NT$29,000 是平衡選擇
highlights.body: L50 Ultra NT$29,000 配連假後 10% off 折扣碼，帶 ProLeap 越障 6 公分加熱水拖地，大多數家庭真的划得來。家裡沒厚地毯、寵物毛沒爆量的話，L50 Ultra 用 56% 的價格達到 X60 Max Ultra 80% 的表現。六月第一週前 NT$30,000 內最有信心的中階推薦。

references.title: iRobot released 9 robot vacuums at once: up to 30,000 Pascal power, climbing over thresholds
Dreame's Lineup at CES 2026 – Including New Ultra-Thin X60 Max Ultra Robot Vacuum
Top 20 Best Robot Vacuums in 2026 | Reviews by Vacuum Wars

en.commentary:
The Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds the top position in robot vacuums for mid-2026, and the performance gap between it and the competition has not closed. The 12,000Pa suction combined with Dreame's ultra-thin chassis design means it reaches under furniture that trips up every other robot in the category. The MopExtend system that extends the mop pad to reach wall edges is a genuine differentiator: wall-edge mopping has been the persistent weakness of robot vacuum-mop combos for years, and Dreame addressed it mechanically rather than through software promises.

The biggest news this month is iRobot's most aggressive product launch in recent memory: nine new Roomba models released simultaneously in mid-May. The flagship Roomba Max 715 and 775 deliver 30,000Pa suction, which outpaces nearly everything on the market. The entire new lineup uses LiDAR navigation rather than camera-based mapping, which speeds up initial home scanning and improves obstacle avoidance in low-light conditions. iRobot at No. 11 in this ranking reflects the older Roomba j9 Plus, but the new Max series will put iRobot back into competitive range at the premium tier.

Dreame's L50 Ultra and L60 lineup expansion continue to push the brand's dominance. The new L60 series offers four tiers from entry to flagship with 35,000Pa suction and 100-degree mop self-cleaning across all tiers. Roborock's Saros 10R at No. 2 and the arm-equipped Saros Z70 at No. 4 represent the most advanced navigation approaches in the category: the Z70 can pick up small objects with its robotic arm before mopping begins, which is the closest thing to a fully autonomous floor-cleaning solution currently available.

highlights.title: iRobot Launches Nine New Roomba Models with 30,000Pa Suction
highlights.body: iRobot's simultaneous mid-May launch of nine new Roomba models, from the budget 115 Combo to the flagship Max 715 and 775 with 30,000Pa suction, is the brand's most significant product refresh in years. All new models use LiDAR navigation instead of cameras, improving mapping speed and low-light performance. This launch puts iRobot back into serious contention at the premium tier.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra's Edge Mopping Sets a New Standard
highlights.body: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra's MopExtend mechanism physically pushes the mop pad outward to clean along baseboards and walls. This mechanical solution to wall-edge coverage is more reliable than software-based zigzag patterns, and it distinguishes the X60 Max Ultra from every competing vacuum-mop combo currently on the market.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros Z70 Arm Technology Moves Toward True Autonomy
highlights.body: The Roborock Saros Z70's robotic arm, which picks up small objects before the mopping cycle begins, represents the most advanced autonomous behavior in consumer robot vacuums. While the arm handles only specific object categories, it removes the single most frustrating pre-cleaning step users face: manually clearing the floor before running the robot.

zh-tw.commentary:
機器人吸塵器今年的競爭激烈程度是歷年最高的，光五月份就有iRobot一口氣推出九款新品，這種規模的產品發布在這個類別很罕見。不過就目前測試數據來看，Dreame X60 Max Ultra還是坐穩第一名的位置，理由是MopExtend機械式拖布延伸系統，可以讓拖布實際推出去貼著牆角清潔，這個機械設計解決了所有機器人拖地機長期以來的死角問題。

iRobot這批新品裡最值得注意的是Roomba Max 715和775，吸力30,000Pa幾乎是目前市場最高，而且全線換成LiDAR導航取代舊的攝影機建圖，建圖速度更快、昏暗環境表現更好。目前排行榜上的Roomba j9 Plus是舊款，等新Max系列的詳細測試結果出來，iRobot的排名應該會往上移動。

Roborock Saros Z70排在第四，因為它有機械手臂，可以在拖地前自動把小物件夾起來放在一邊，這是目前消費等級機器人吸塵器裡最接近「全自動」的概念。Dreame L60系列新推出四個等級，全系列標配35,000Pa吸力和100度高溫自清潔拖布，入門款也有旗艦功能，整條產品線的性價比都很高。

Ecovacs DEEBOT X5 Pro Omni在OLED顯示底座和語音互動這塊做得最有質感，適合重視居家美感的用戶。Eufy X10 Pro Omni的iPath導航在複雜家具環境下表現穩定，也是個性價比不錯的選擇。

highlights.title: iRobot五月同時推出九款Roomba新品
highlights.body: iRobot在五月中旬同步發布九款新Roomba，旗艦Roomba Max 715和775吸力達30,000Pa，全線換成LiDAR導航。這是iRobot近年最大規模的產品更新，新款LiDAR建圖速度和昏暗環境表現都比舊款攝影機方案明顯進步，預計會讓iRobot重新殺回高階市場。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra拖布延伸設計解決牆角死角
highlights.body: MopExtend系統讓拖布物理性地推出去貼牆清潔，比靠軟體走Z字形更可靠。這個機械設計直接解決了所有吸拖合一機器人長期存在的牆角清潔問題，是目前市面上所有競品都沒有辦法複製的差異化設計。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros Z70機械手臂朝全自動邁進
highlights.body: Saros Z70的機械手臂可以在拖地前自動把地上的小物件夾起來，省去最讓人煩惱的「跑機器人前要先撿地上東西」這個步驟。雖然手臂目前能處理的物件種類有限，但這個設計方向代表機器人吸塵器真正走向全自動的第一步。

references.title: Roborock Saros 20 vs Dreame X60 Max Ultra: Which 2026 Flagship Wins?
Best (May 2026) Robot Vacuums
I've seen most of 2026's new robot vacuums and these are the 2 models I can't wait to try

en.commentary: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra stays my number one this week, and the latest testing keeps backing it. It holds a Vacuum Wars score of 4.11 and still delivers the most consistent all-around performance in the category. The slim 3.13-inch retractable-LiDAR body climbs 51mm thresholds, pushes 35,000Pa of suction, and scored 89 percent on carpet deep-clean and a perfect 100 percent on flattened pet-hair pickup in testing. At roughly 1,499 to 1,699 dollars it also delivers more cleaning performance per dollar than its closest rival, which is exactly why it keeps the crown. The big news is the Roborock Saros 20, the successor to the hugely popular Saros 10R. It keeps everything people loved about the 10R and adds an improved AdaptiLift system that climbs even taller thresholds, plus Matter support and Roborock's polished app. At around 1,599 dollars it justifies the premium if you specifically need maximum threshold crossing or the best app experience. I am keeping the Saros 10R at number two for now since the Saros 20 is still rolling out, but anyone shopping the top tier should put the 20 on their radar. The Dreame L50 Ultra holds third as the value flagship, pairing excellent mopping with a friendlier price. Roborock's Saros Z70 keeps its spot for the robotic arm novelty, and the Qrevo CurvX stays a strong mid-premium all-rounder. My guidance is consistent. The X60 Max Ultra is the best overall buy, and the Saros 20 is the one to watch if threshold climbing and Matter matter most to you.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra stays on top
highlights.body: A 4.11 Vacuum Wars score, 35,000Pa suction, 51mm threshold climbing, and a perfect pet-hair pickup score keep it the best overall.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 20 arrives
highlights.body: The Saros 10R successor adds an improved AdaptiLift system for taller thresholds, plus Matter support and Roborock's polished app.

highlights.title: Value still favors Dreame
highlights.body: At roughly 1,499 dollars the X60 Max Ultra delivers more cleaning per dollar than the 1,599-dollar Saros 20.

highlights.title: Saros 20 justifies its premium for climbers
highlights.body: If you specifically need maximum threshold crossing, Matter, or the best app, the Saros 20 earns its higher price.

highlights.title: Value flagship holds at third
highlights.body: The Dreame L50 Ultra pairs excellent mopping with a friendlier price, staying my pick for buyers who want flagship cleaning for less.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週掃地機器人我還是把 Dreame X60 Max Ultra 放第一，最新的測試一直在幫它撐腰。它在 Vacuum Wars 拿到 4.11 分，整體表現依然是這個品類裡最穩定的。機身薄到 3.13 吋、用可伸縮 LiDAR，能爬 51mm 門檻，吸力衝到 35,000Pa，測試裡地毯深層清潔拿 89%，壓平寵物毛清除更是滿分 100%。售價大約 1,499 到 1,699 美元，每一塊錢換到的清潔力也比最接近的對手高，這正是它守住王座的原因。最大的新聞是 Roborock Saros 20，超人氣 Saros 10R 的接班人。它保留了 10R 大家喜歡的一切，再加上升級的 AdaptiLift 系統，能爬更高的門檻，還支援 Matter，搭配 Roborock 那套打磨得很好的 App。大約 1,599 美元，如果你特別需要最強的越障能力或最好的 App 體驗，這個溢價就值得。我暫時把 Saros 10R 留在第二，因為 Saros 20 還在鋪貨，但要買高階機種的人都該把 20 放進雷達。Dreame L50 Ultra 守第三，是性價比旗艦，拖地很強、價格又比較親民。Roborock Saros Z70 靠機械手臂的新奇感守位，Qrevo CurvX 則是中高階很全面的選擇。我的建議一致，X60 Max Ultra 是整體最值得買的，Saros 20 則是越障跟 Matter 對你最重要時要盯緊的那台。台灣這邊旗艦機普遍落在 NT$40,000 以上，預算夠就直接上 X60。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 穩坐第一
highlights.body: Vacuum Wars 4.11 分、35,000Pa 吸力、能爬 51mm 門檻，寵物毛清除滿分，整體最值得買。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 20 登場
highlights.body: Saros 10R 接班人加上升級的 AdaptiLift 能爬更高門檻，還支援 Matter 跟打磨精良的 App。

highlights.title: 性價比仍偏向 Dreame
highlights.body: 大約 1,499 美元的 X60 Max Ultra，每塊錢換到的清潔力比 1,599 美元的 Saros 20 高。

highlights.title: Saros 20 對越障需求者值回票價
highlights.body: 如果你特別需要最強越障、Matter 或最好的 App，Saros 20 的較高售價就站得住腳。

highlights.title: 性價比旗艦守第三
highlights.body: Dreame L50 Ultra 拖地強、價格親民，是想用較少預算拿到旗艦清潔力的首選。

references.title: Roborock Saros 20 vs Dreame X60 Max Ultra: Which 2026 Flagship Wins?
Best (May 2026) Robot Vacuums
Best Robot Vacuum Cleaners This Summer 2026

en.commentary:
The Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds our top spot, and the latest testing confirms why it keeps winning the all-around title. Vacuum Wars currently rates it the best overall robot vacuum for the season, and it earns that by cleaning better than anything else in the field. In their lab it posted an 89 percent carpet deep-clean score and a rare 100 percent in flattened pet-hair pickup, which is the result that separates a great robovac from a merely good one. The hardware backs it up: a slim 3.13-inch retractable-LiDAR profile, 51 mm threshold climbing, 35,000 Pa of suction, and the HyperStream Duo Divide anti-tangle brush that keeps long hair from binding up the roller. Despite a wave of new releases from Dyson and Shark, the X60 stays the most consistent performer tested.

The Roborock Saros 20 at rank 2 is the one to watch if your home has obstacles the rest of the field cannot handle. Its AdaptiLift Chassis 3.0 crosses double-layer thresholds up to 3.46 inches, which covers raised bathroom tiles, thick transition strips, and even small steps between rooms. The honest summary is that the Dreame cleans better while the Roborock navigates better, and at current pricing the X60 delivers more cleaning performance per dollar.

The Dreame L50 Ultra at rank 3 brings flagship features down to a more reachable price, the Roborock Saros Z70 at rank 4 carries the mechanical arm that picks up small clutter, and the Roborock Qrevo CurvX at rank 5 rounds out the list with strong mopping. For most homes heading into summer, the X60 Max Ultra remains the safest pick, it simply cleans floors and carpet better than the competition.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Wins on Cleaning Performance
highlights.body: It posted an 89 percent carpet deep-clean score and a perfect 100 percent in flattened pet-hair pickup in Vacuum Wars testing, the best all-around results in the field. With 35,000 Pa suction and the HyperStream Duo Divide anti-tangle brush, it stays the most consistent performer despite new Dyson and Shark releases.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 20 Crosses Thresholds Nothing Else Can
highlights.body: Its AdaptiLift Chassis 3.0 climbs double-layer thresholds up to 3.46 inches, clearing raised bathroom tiles, thick transition strips, and small steps between rooms. If navigation through a complex floor plan is your main obstacle, it is the bot to buy.

highlights.title: X60 Delivers More Cleaning Per Dollar
highlights.body: At current pricing the Dreame X60 Max Ultra offers more cleaning performance per dollar than the Roborock Saros 20. The honest split is simple: the Dreame cleans better, the Roborock navigates better, and most homes are better served by cleaning.

zh-tw.commentary:
Dreame X60 Max Ultra 穩坐我們的榜首，最新測試也再次證明它為什麼能一直拿下全能冠軍。Vacuum Wars 目前把它評為本季最佳全能掃地機器人，靠的就是它比場上任何對手都掃得乾淨。在他們的實驗室裡，它拿下 89% 的地毯深層清潔分數，還有罕見的 100% 壓平寵物毛拾取率，這個成績就是把頂級掃地機和「還不錯」拉開差距的關鍵。硬體也撐得起來：3.13 吋的可伸縮 LiDAR 薄身、51mm 越障能力、35,000 Pa 吸力，加上 HyperStream Duo Divide 防纏繞滾刷，長頭髮不會把滾筒卡死。即使 Dyson 和 Shark 推了一波新機，X60 仍然是測過最穩定的那台。

第二名的 Roborock Saros 20，如果你家有那些別人過不去的障礙，它就是該關注的對象。它的 AdaptiLift Chassis 3.0 能跨越最高 3.46 吋的雙層門檻，浴室墊高磁磚、厚的過門條、甚至房間之間的小台階都能搞定。老實說就是：Dreame 掃得比較乾淨，Roborock 走位比較強，而以目前定價，X60 每塊錢買到的清潔力更多。

第三名的 Dreame L50 Ultra 把旗艦功能下放到更好入手的價位，第四名的 Roborock Saros Z70 帶著能撿小雜物的機械手臂，第五名的 Roborock Qrevo CurvX 靠強悍拖地補上榜尾。夏天對大多數家庭來說，X60 Max Ultra 仍然是最穩的選擇，它就是把地板和地毯掃得比對手乾淨。

highlights.body: Vacuum Wars 測試中拿下 89% 地毯深層清潔分數、100% 壓平寵物毛拾取率，是場上最佳全能成績。35,000 Pa 吸力加上 HyperStream Duo Divide 防纏繞滾刷，即使 Dyson、Shark 推新機，它仍是最穩定的那台。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 20 越障能力無人能及
highlights.body: AdaptiLift Chassis 3.0 能跨越最高 3.46 吋的雙層門檻，墊高浴室磁磚、厚過門條、房間小台階都不是問題。如果你家複雜格局的走位是主要難題，就選這台。

en.commentary:
Heading into June the Dreame X60 Max Ultra stays my number one, and the latest monthly testing keeps confirming the call. Vacuum Wars still names it the best overall robot vacuum for June 2026, and it keeps that title by cleaning more consistently than anything else in the field. The combination of 35,000 Pa suction, the HyperStream Duo Divide anti-tangle brush, and the slim retractable-LiDAR profile means it handles deep carpet, flattened pet hair, and low-clearance furniture without me babysitting it. That is the whole point of paying flagship money, and the X60 earns it week after week.

The Roborock Saros 20 holds rank 2 as the navigation specialist. Its AdaptiLift chassis still crosses thresholds the rest of the field stalls on, so if your home has raised tile, thick transition strips, or a small step between rooms, this is the one that keeps going. The honest split remains the same: Dreame cleans a touch better, Roborock climbs and maps a touch better, and both are excellent.

The interesting story this month is downstream. Flagship features like roller mops, advanced obstacle avoidance, and self-emptying docks are landing in mid-priced models, and the Ecovacs Deebot T90 Pro Omni is the poster child. It delivers near-flagship mopping and automation at a price well under the top tier, which is why it remains my value pick. The Ecovacs X12 OmniCyclone is also worth a look for its bagless dock if you would rather rinse a bin than buy bags. I made no ranking changes today because nothing in the news shifts the order, the field is just getting deeper.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra is still the most consistent cleaner
highlights.body: It keeps the overall crown in June testing on the strength of 35,000 Pa suction, the HyperStream Duo Divide anti-tangle brush, and a slim retractable-LiDAR body. That mix delivers strong deep-carpet results and excellent flattened pet-hair pickup, which is exactly what separates a flagship from a merely good robovac.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 20 is the home for obstacle-heavy floors
highlights.body: The AdaptiLift chassis crosses raised thresholds, thick transition strips, and small inter-room steps that stop most rivals. If your layout is full of these, the Saros 20 navigates and maps its way through where others get stuck, making it the smarter pick for tricky homes.

highlights.title: Ecovacs Deebot T90 Pro Omni is the value standout
highlights.body: Flagship features are moving downstream fast, and the T90 Pro Omni captures most of them, strong mopping, advanced obstacle avoidance, and a full self-empty dock, at a price well below the ultra-premium tier. It is the model I point budget-conscious buyers to this month.

zh-tw.commentary:
進入六月，Dreame X60 Max Ultra 在我這還是穩坐第一，最新的月度測試也一直印證這個判斷。Vacuum Wars 六月還是把它選為整體最強掃地機器人，它靠的就是清潔表現比其他機型更穩定。35,000 Pa 吸力、HyperStream Duo Divide 防纏繞滾刷，加上薄型可伸縮 LiDAR 機身，深層地毯、被踩平的寵物毛、低矮家具底下，它通通自己搞定，我完全不用在旁邊顧。說真的，花旗艦價就是要買這種省心，這台週週都對得起價錢。

Roborock Saros 20 守在第二，是越障專家。它的 AdaptiLift 底盤還是能跨過其他機型卡住的門檻，家裡有架高磁磚、厚過門條、房間之間有小落差的話，這台就是不會停下來的那台。老實講兩台的差別很單純，Dreame 清潔稍微好一點，Roborock 爬坡跟建圖稍微好一點，兩台都很頂。

這個月真正有看頭的是中階機。滾刷拖地、進階避障、自動倒垃圾這些旗艦功能，正快速下放到中價位機型，Ecovacs Deebot T90 Pro Omni 就是最佳代表。它用遠低於頂規的價格，端出接近旗艦的拖地跟自動化，所以還是我的高 CP 值首選。想省下集塵袋錢的話，X12 OmniCyclone 的免袋集塵座也值得看。今天排名沒動，新聞沒有撼動順序的事件，純粹是這個級距越來越深。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 還是清潔最穩的那台
highlights.body: 六月測試它繼續抱走整體冠軍，靠的是 35,000 Pa 吸力、HyperStream Duo Divide 防纏繞滾刷，加上薄型可伸縮 LiDAR 機身。深層地毯成績強、被踩平的寵物毛也清得乾淨，這正是旗艦機跟堪用機之間的差距。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 20 是門檻多的家的解答
highlights.body: AdaptiLift 底盤能跨過架高磁磚、厚過門條、房間小落差，這些都是讓多數對手卡住的地方。家裡地形複雜的話，Saros 20 一路導航建圖過得去，別台卻會卡關，這種格局它就是聰明選擇。

highlights.title: Ecovacs Deebot T90 Pro Omni 是高 CP 值代表
highlights.body: 旗艦功能下放得很快，T90 Pro Omni 幾乎全收了，強拖地、進階避障、完整自動集塵座，價格卻遠低於頂規。這個月想精打細算的人，我都先指這台。

en.commentary: Heading into June 2026 the Dreame X60 Max Ultra stays my top pick, and after another month of testing I'm even more confident in it. It still posts the cleanest all-around results I've seen, balancing strong suction, sharp obstacle avoidance, flagship mopping and a dock that genuinely runs itself. The Roborock Saros 10R holds second on the strength of its mapping and low-profile chassis that slides under furniture nothing else reaches. The bigger story this month sits lower in the market. Vacuum Wars' June roundup confirms flagship features are racing downstream fast, with the Ecovacs Deebot T90 Pro Omni, which debuted at CES 2026, now beating older value picks on obstacle avoidance and mopping. Roller-mop systems are the trend everyone is chasing, and they genuinely scrub better than spinning pads on dried-on messes. For my own home, where two cats shed year round and Taiwan's humidity leaves a sticky film on tile, that mopping upgrade matters more than another 1000Pa of suction. I kept the rankings unchanged because the leaders earned their spots and nothing released this week dethrones them. If you are shopping, the value tier is where the real movement is happening, so watch the sub-flagship models closely. The Dreame L50 Ultra remains my smart-money flagship pick for anyone who wants near top-tier mopping without paying the absolute premium.

en.commentary: The big story in robot vacuums this June is the roller-mop takeover, and I want to be clear about what it does and does not change at the top. The new wave of roller-mop systems, led by the Ecovacs Deebot T90 Pro Omni that premiered at CES 2026 and the Eufy Omni C28, is genuinely better at lifting dried stains than the spinning-pad designs most robots still use, and that is reshaping the value tier fast. The T90 Pro Omni in particular has become the mid-range mop king and a deserved new value pick everywhere I look. That said, my number one does not move. The Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete at 1,699.99 dollars still wins the overall crown because nothing beats its balance of 35,000 Pa suction, a slim 3.13-inch retractable-LiDAR body that actually clears low furniture, and the most complete dock and mopping package on the market. Roborock Saros 10R holds second as the navigation and thin-profile specialist, and the Dreame L50 Ultra stays third as the smartest value-to-performance buy in the lineup. The roller-mop momentum matters most below the podium, where Ecovacs and Eufy keep getting stronger, so I am holding ranks this week and letting the commentary flag the trend. If you are shopping the value tier, watch the roller-mop models closely. If you want the single best robot regardless of price, the X60 Max Ultra is still the answer.

zh-tw.commentary: 這個月掃地機器人最大的新聞，就是滾筒拖布全面崛起，我想把它對榜首到底有沒有影響講清楚。這一波滾筒拖布系統，由 CES 2026 亮相的 Ecovacs Deebot T90 Pro Omni 跟 Eufy Omni C28 領軍，清乾掉的污漬確實比多數機器還在用的旋轉拖盤強很多，這正在快速重塑性價比這一段。尤其 T90 Pro Omni 已經變成中階拖地王，我到處看到它被選為新的高性價比首選，實至名歸。話雖如此，我的第一名沒有動。Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete 售價約台幣五萬出頭，整體冠軍還是它，因為沒有對手能贏過它那套平衡，35,000 Pa 吸力、3.13 吋薄機身配可伸縮 LiDAR 真的鑽得進低矮家具底下，加上市面上最完整的基座跟拖地配套。Roborock Saros 10R 守第二，是導航跟薄身專家，Dreame L50 Ultra 守第三，是整個陣容裡性價比最聰明的買法。滾筒拖布的氣勢主要影響的是頒獎台以下，Ecovacs 跟 Eufy 一直在變強，所以這週我守住排名，讓內文幫你標記趨勢。你如果在挑性價比這段，盯緊滾筒拖布機型。你如果不管預算就要最強那一台，答案還是 X60 Max Ultra。

highlights.body: 售價約台幣五萬出頭，35,000 Pa 吸力配 3.13 吋薄身可伸縮 LiDAR，加上市面最完整的基座配套。沒有對手能在全面平衡上追上它，所以第一還是它。

en.commentary: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra stays at number one because it is the robot that gets closest to actually replacing your manual vacuum, and that is the only bar that matters at the top. The suction handles carpet deep-cleaning that most robots fake, the mopping lifts and washes itself, and the dock automates everything so you genuinely forget it exists for weeks. For most homes that want true hands-off cleaning, this is the one worth the premium. The Roborock Saros 10R holds a close second and is a legitimate co-leader, its solid-state LiDAR and obstacle recognition give the best navigation in the category, so it threads around cables and clutter that trip up rivals. The choice between it and the Dreame comes down to whether you prioritize cleaning power or navigation smarts. The Dreame L50 Ultra stays third as the value flagship with most of the top features for less. The Roborock Saros Z70 holds fourth for its arm that picks up small objects. Nothing this week reordered the field. The read: best cleaning is the Dreame X60, best navigation is the Roborock Saros 10R, best value is the L50.

highlights.body: The Dreame wins on raw cleaning, the Roborock on threading around obstacles. A cluttered home with cables and toys leans Roborock; open floors that need deep carpet cleaning lean Dreame.

references.title: Top 20 Best Robot Vacuums in 2026
The 4 Best Robot Vacuums of 2026

en.commentary:
Robot vacuums are now decided at the edges and corners, not on open floor, because every flagship cleans the middle of a room fine. The Dreame X60 Max Ultra stays my top pick in June 2026. It pairs 36,000Pa HyperForce suction with a dual anti-tangle system that genuinely stops hair from wrapping the brush, and Vacuum Wars currently rates it first overall on its 2026 Top 20 with a 4.08 composite, the highest of any flagship they have benchmarked this year. That is not a marketing number, it is a tested result, and it is why this machine holds the line.

The Roborock Saros 10R sits second and is the one I recommend to people who hate false stops. RTINGS named it the best robot vacuum they tested, crediting its multiple solid-state LiDAR sensors and obstacle recognition for excellent avoidance in a remarkably low-profile body that slides under more furniture. The Dreame L50 Ultra holds third, sitting atop Vacuum Wars' all-time rankings on the strength of 180-plus recognized object types, ProLeap legs for thresholds, and the longest effective cleaning range they measure.

The new arrival this month is the Ecovacs Deebot X12 OmniCyclone at fourth. It earns the spot on a bagless OmniCyclone dock that skips dust bags entirely and a FocusJet roller mop that pre-soaks dried-on messes before the OZMO Roller 3.0 scrubs them clean, and Vacuum Wars rated it right behind the X60 in their June testing for obstacle avoidance and pet hair pickup. At $1,499 it asks full flagship money, so the value score keeps it a step under the top three, yet on raw cleaning and mopping hardware it runs with anything here.

From there it is about fit. The Roborock Saros Z70 brings the mechanical arm that actually picks up socks, the Qrevo CurvX delivers 22,000Pa hands-free cleaning at a friendlier price. Ecovacs Deebot X5 Pro Omni and Eufy X10 Pro Omni are the value flagships, Mova P10 Pro Ultra and Narwal Freo X Ultra cover the mid tier, and the Dreame L20, Roomba J9+, and Shark Matrix Plus anchor the dependable end. The X12's arrival is the only move this week, and it lands exactly where its hardware says it should.

highlights.title: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra is the flagship that actually stops hair tangles
highlights.body: Hair wrap is the failure that turns a great vacuum into a weekly chore, and most premium units only slow it down. The X60 Max Ultra attacks it with a dual anti-tangle system that cuts and channels hair off the brush, backed by 36,000Pa HyperForce suction that lifts embedded grit from carpet. Vacuum Wars rates it first overall on its 2026 Top 20 with a 4.08 composite, the highest flagship score they recorded this year. When raw cleaning power and a brush you never have to unwind both matter, this is the machine that delivers both.

highlights.title: The Roborock Saros 10R is the pick if you hate a vacuum that keeps getting stuck
highlights.body: Nothing kills trust in a robot vacuum faster than finding it beached on a cable or stranded under a chair. The Saros 10R solves that with multiple solid-state LiDAR sensors and obstacle recognition that RTINGS rated as excellent, in a body so low it slips under furniture that stops taller robots cold. RTINGS named it the best robot vacuum they tested in 2026. For a cluttered home with cords, toys, and low clearances, this is the one that finishes its route instead of phoning home for rescue.

highlights.title: The Dreame L50 Ultra tops the all-time rankings for a reason
highlights.body: Sitting at number one on Vacuum Wars' all-time list is not a small claim, and the L50 Ultra earns it on capability. It recognizes 180-plus object types so it avoids the right things, its ProLeap legs lift the chassis over high thresholds that trap most robots, and it has the longest effective cleaning range Vacuum Wars measures, meaning fewer trips back to the dock on big floor plans. It costs less than the newest X60 flagship while doing almost everything it does. For value at the high end, this is the smart buy.

highlights.title: The Roborock Saros Z70 is the only one that actually tidies up after you
highlights.body: Every other robot just vacuums around the sock on the floor; the Saros Z70 has a mechanical arm that reaches out and moves it. The OmniGrip arm picks up lightweight obstacles like socks and small toys and relocates them so the vacuum can clean the spot underneath, which is a genuinely new capability rather than a spec bump. It is not the cheapest path to clean floors, but if you are tired of pre-tidying before you run the robot, this is the one that closes that gap and holds fourth on the board.

zh-tw.commentary:
掃地機器人現在勝負在邊角，不在開闊地板，因為每台旗艦掃房間中央都沒問題。2026 年六月我的首選還是 Dreame X60 Max Ultra。它把 36,000Pa HyperForce 吸力配上雙重防纏繞系統，是真的能阻止頭髮繞上刷頭那種，而 Vacuum Wars 目前在 2026 前 20 名榜單把它排第一，綜合分 4.08，是他們今年測過所有旗艦裡最高的。這不是行銷數字，是實測結果，也是這台守得住位置的原因。

第二名 Roborock Saros 10R，是我會推給最討厭機器亂卡住的人。RTINGS 把它選為測過最好的掃地機，理由是多顆固態光達加物體辨識帶來的優秀避障，加上機身超低，能鑽進更多家具底下。第三名 Dreame L50 Ultra，靠著辨識 180 種以上物體、跨門檻的 ProLeap 升降腳、以及他們測過最長的有效清掃範圍，穩坐 Vacuum Wars 歷代總榜第一。

這個月的新面孔是 Ecovacs Deebot X12 OmniCyclone，我把它放第四。它靠的是無集塵袋的旋風集塵基座，整個跳過集塵袋這件事，加上 FocusJet 滾筒拖布會先對乾掉的髒污噴水軟化，再讓 OZMO Roller 3.0 滾筒刷過去。Vacuum Wars 六月實測在避障和寵物毛拾取上把它排在 X60 後面緊咬。售價約 NT$48,000 是十足的旗艦價，所以性價比這項把它壓在前三名之下，但講清潔和拖地的硬體實力，它跟這裡任何一台都拼得過。

再往下就是看適不適合你。Roborock Saros Z70 帶來真的能撿起襪子的機械手臂，Qrevo CurvX 用更親民的價格給你 22,000Pa 免動手清潔。Ecovacs Deebot X5 Pro Omni 和 Eufy X10 Pro Omni 是性價比旗艦，Mova P10 Pro Ultra 和 Narwal Freo X Ultra 顧中階，Dreame L20、Roomba J9+ 和 Shark Matrix Plus 撐住可靠那一端。這週唯一的變動就是 X12 加入，它落在硬體實力該有的位置。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 是真的能擋住頭髮纏繞的旗艦
highlights.body: 頭髮纏繞是把一台好掃地機變成每週苦差事的元兇，多數高階機只能讓它慢一點。X60 Max Ultra 直接用雙重防纏繞系統下手，把頭髮從刷頭切斷導走，再配上 36,000Pa HyperForce 吸力，把卡進地毯的細砂吸起來。Vacuum Wars 在 2026 前 20 名榜單把它排第一，綜合分 4.08，是他們今年記錄到的旗艦最高分。當你同時要強悍吸力和一支永遠不用拆來解纏的刷頭，這台兩個都給你。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R 是最討厭機器一直卡住的人該選的那台
highlights.body: 沒有什麼比發現掃地機卡在電線上、或擱淺在椅子底下更快摧毀你對它的信任。Saros 10R 用多顆固態光達加物體辨識解決這件事，RTINGS 評為優秀，機身又低到能鑽進會擋住高個機器人的家具底下。RTINGS 把它選為 2026 年測過最好的掃地機。對一個堆滿電線、玩具又低矮的家，這台會把路線跑完，而不是回頭呼救。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 登上歷代總榜第一是有道理的
highlights.body: 坐上 Vacuum Wars 歷代總榜第一不是小事，L50 Ultra 靠實力拿下。它能辨識 180 種以上物體，所以該閃的都閃，ProLeap 升降腳能把機身抬過卡死多數機器人的高門檻，還有 Vacuum Wars 測過最長的有效清掃範圍，意思是大坪數時跑回基座的次數更少。它比最新的 X60 旗艦便宜，卻幾乎什麼都做得到。要在高階段買到性價比，這台是聰明選擇。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros Z70 是唯一真的會幫你收拾的那台
highlights.body: 其他掃地機都只是繞過地上那隻襪子，Saros Z70 有一支機械手臂會伸出去把它移開。OmniGrip 手臂能撿起襪子、小玩具這類輕量障礙物並挪走，讓機器能清下面那塊地，這是真的新功能，不是規格灌水。它不是讓地板變乾淨最便宜的路，但如果你受夠了每次開機前要先收一輪，這台補上了那個缺口，穩守榜單第四。

en.commentary: June kept the top of this category exactly where I had it. Vacuum Wars again named the Dreame X60 Max Ultra its best overall for the month, and I agree, because no other unit I have run balances pet hair handling, obstacle avoidance, carpet cleaning, and dock automation as evenly. It just does everything well without an obvious weak spot. The Roborock Saros 10R stays a close second on navigation and mopping finesse, and the Dreame L50 Ultra rounds out a strong trio with its low profile body that slides under more furniture than its rivals. The market trend this month is hot water mopping docks becoming standard above the four hundred dollar line and AI avoidance now recognizing over a hundred object types, which the Ecovacs Deebot X12 OmniCyclone and its FocusJet pre soak feature show off well at rank four. None of that reshuffles the order for me. Prices held and no flagship launched that beats the current one, so I carried the board forward. For most homes with pets and a mix of floors, the Dreame X60 Max Ultra is the buy. If you want the best mapping and edge mopping, the Saros 10R is the alternative I respect.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra is still the all rounder to beat
highlights.body: It balances pet hair pickup, obstacle avoidance, carpet depth, and dock automation with no obvious weak point. Vacuum Wars crowned it again this month and my testing agrees.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R is the navigation and mopping pick
highlights.body: Its mapping precision and edge mopping are the cleanest I have seen, making it the natural second choice for tidy, well mapped homes.

highlights.title: Ecovacs Deebot X12 OmniCyclone shows where the market is going
highlights.body: The FocusJet pre soak and improved AI avoidance reflect the 2026 trend of hot water docks and smarter object recognition becoming standard above the mid tier.

zh-tw.commentary: 六月這個類別的頂端，跟我原本排的完全一樣。Vacuum Wars 這個月再次把 Dreame X60 Max Ultra 選為最佳整體，我同意，因為我跑過的機種裡，沒有一台能把寵物毛處理、避障、地毯清潔跟基站自動化平衡得這麼均勻，樣樣都好，沒有明顯弱點。Roborock Saros 10R 靠導航跟拖地細膩度緊咬第二，Dreame L50 Ultra 機身扁平，能鑽進更多家具底下，組成很強的前三。這個月的市場趨勢是熱水拖布基站在台幣一萬出頭以上變成標配，AI 避障也能辨識超過一百種物體，第四名 Ecovacs Deebot X12 OmniCyclone 的 FocusJet 預濕功能就是好例子。但這些都不會讓我重排順序。價格穩定，也沒有更強的旗艦上市，所以榜單原樣延續。家裡有寵物又是混合地板，買 Dreame X60 Max Ultra 準沒錯。想要最強的地圖跟邊角拖地，Saros 10R 是我認可的另一選擇。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 仍是最難打敗的全能機
highlights.body: 寵物毛、避障、地毯深度清潔、基站自動化都平衡得很好，沒有明顯短板。Vacuum Wars 這個月再次封王，跟我的實測一致。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R 是導航與拖地首選
highlights.body: 地圖精度跟邊角拖地是我看過最乾淨的，對格局整齊、地圖建得好的家庭是很自然的第二選擇。

highlights.title: Ecovacs Deebot X12 OmniCyclone 展現市場走向
highlights.body: FocusJet 預濕加上更聰明的 AI 避障，正好反映 2026 年熱水基站與物體辨識在中階以上變成標配的趨勢。

en.commentary: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds number one for June, and the consensus around it is hardening. Vacuum Wars keeps naming it the best overall for the month because it delivers the strongest all-around profile: elite pet hair pickup, top-tier obstacle avoidance, excellent carpet cleaning, and one of the most capable dock systems on the market. When a vacuum is great at everything rather than spiky on one metric, it earns the top spot, and the X60 is that vacuum. The Roborock Saros 10R stays second, and RTINGS still calls it the best robot vacuum they have tested, crediting its multiple solid-state LiDAR sensors for great obstacle avoidance in a body low enough to slide under furniture other flagships cannot reach. The Dreame L50 Ultra holds third as the value-flagship sweet spot, near top-tier mopping and cleaning at a price that undercuts the absolute premium tier. The Ecovacs X12 OmniCyclone keeps fourth on the strength of its bagless OmniCyclone dock, which spares you the recurring cost of dust bags. The Roborock Qrevo CurvX continues to punch above its price with a 92 percent carpet deep-clean score and zero hair tangles in testing. Nothing this week moved the order.

highlights.title: Great at everything wins
highlights.body: The Dreame X60 leads not by spiking one metric but by topping pet pickup, obstacle avoidance, carpet, and dock together. The complete package.

highlights.title: Low profile, sharp eyes
highlights.body: The Saros 10R's solid-state LiDAR keeps obstacle avoidance elite in a body short enough to clean under furniture rivals cannot reach.

highlights.title: The value-flagship pick
highlights.body: The Dreame L50 Ultra delivers near top-tier mopping and cleaning while undercutting the absolute premium tier on price.

highlights.title: Skip the dust bags
highlights.body: The Ecovacs X12 OmniCyclone uses a bagless cyclone dock, sparing you the recurring cost flagship docks usually impose.

highlights.title: Mid-range overachiever
highlights.body: The Qrevo CurvX hit a 92 percent carpet deep-clean score with zero hair tangles, ranking among the best regardless of price.

zh-tw.commentary: 追覓 Dreame X60 Max Ultra 六月繼續穩坐第一，外界的共識也越來越鞏固。Vacuum Wars 本月還是把它選為總冠軍，因為它的整體表現最全面，寵物毛吸得乾淨、避障頂尖、地毯清潔優秀，基座系統也是市面上最強的之一。說真的，一台掃地機厲害在樣樣都行、而不是某一項特別突出，這才配得上第一，X60 就是這種機器。石頭 Roborock Saros 10R 守住第二，RTINGS 依舊說它是他們測過最好的掃地機，靠的是多顆固態光達感測器帶來的優異避障，加上機身夠扁，能鑽進其他旗艦進不去的傢俱底下。追覓 L50 Ultra 第三，是性價比旗艦的甜蜜點，拖地跟清潔逼近頂規，價格卻壓在絕對高階之下。Ecovacs X12 OmniCyclone 第四，靠的是免集塵袋的旋風基座，幫你省下集塵袋的長期耗材費。石頭 Qrevo CurvX 繼續越級打怪，實測地毯深層清潔拿到 92 分、零纏毛。這週排名沒有任何變動。

highlights.title: 樣樣都行才是贏家
highlights.body: 追覓 X60 不是靠單項爆衝，而是寵物毛、避障、地毯、基座一起拉到頂。這就是完整的全能機。

highlights.title: 扁身配利眼
highlights.body: Saros 10R 用固態光達把避障維持在頂尖，機身又夠扁，能鑽進對手進不去的傢俱底下。

highlights.title: 性價比旗艦首選
highlights.body: 追覓 L50 Ultra 拖地跟清潔逼近頂規，價格卻壓在絕對高階之下。

highlights.title: 省下集塵袋
highlights.body: Ecovacs X12 OmniCyclone 用免袋旋風基座，幫你省掉旗艦基座那筆長期耗材錢。

highlights.title: 中階越級打怪
highlights.body: Qrevo CurvX 地毯深層清潔拿 92 分、零纏毛，不分價位都排得進前段班。

Vacuum Wars keeps naming it the best overall for the month because no other robot matches its balance of cleaning, obstacle avoidance and pet handling, and the latest testing backs that up with a rare 100 percent flattened pet-hair pickup score and an 89 percent carpet deep-clean result. Its slim 3.13 inch retractable-LiDAR body, 35,000Pa suction and anti-tangle brush are why it cleans great everywhere rather than spiking on one metric, and that breadth is what earns the top spot. The Roborock Saros 10R stays second, and RTINGS still calls it among the best they have tested, crediting its solid-state LiDAR for great obstacle avoidance in a body low enough to slide under furniture other flagships cannot reach. The Dreame L50 Ultra holds third as the value-flagship sweet spot, near top-tier mopping and cleaning at a price that undercuts the premium tier. The Ecovacs X12 OmniCyclone keeps fourth on its bagless OmniCyclone dock, which spares you the recurring cost of dust bags. One trend worth flagging from this week's reviews, flagship features like advanced mopping and premium docks are now showing up in models well below traditional flagship pricing, so the value tier keeps getting better. Nothing moved the order at the top this week.

highlights.title: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra is the all-rounder champ
highlights.body: The X60 Max Ultra holds number one because it is great at everything rather than spiky on one metric. Latest testing gave it a rare 100 percent flattened pet-hair pickup and 89 percent carpet deep-clean, and with 35,000Pa suction and a slim retractable-LiDAR body it earns its 9.5 cleaning, mapping and mopping scores.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R slides where others cannot
highlights.body: The Saros 10R stays second on a body low enough to clean under furniture taller flagships miss, paired with solid-state LiDAR for excellent obstacle avoidance. RTINGS still rates it among the best they have tested, and its 9.5 mapping score reflects navigation that rarely gets stuck or confused.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra is the value-flagship sweet spot
highlights.body: The L50 Ultra holds third with a 9.2 value because it delivers near top-tier mopping and cleaning at a price that undercuts the absolute premium tier. If you want flagship results without flagship cost, this is the one that gives up the least to save you the most.

highlights.title: Flagship features are reaching cheaper tiers
highlights.body: Reviews this week note advanced mopping systems and premium dock automations now appear well below traditional flagship pricing. That makes mid-range picks like the Ecovacs X12 OmniCyclone, with its bag-free dock, smarter buys, because you get high-end convenience without the top-tier price.

zh-tw.commentary: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 六月繼續坐第一，圍繞它的共識正在變硬。Vacuum Wars 持續把它列為當月最佳，因為清潔、避障、寵物毛處理的平衡沒有別台比得上，最新測試也佐證這點，給了罕見的 100% 壓平寵物毛拾取，還有 89% 地毯深層清潔。它纖薄 3.13 吋可伸縮光達機身、35,000Pa 吸力跟防纏繞刷頭，就是它到處都掃得好、而不是單項突出的原因，這種全面性正是它坐第一的本錢。Roborock Saros 10R 第二，RTINGS 還是把它列為實測過最好之一，稱讚它的固態光達避障出色，機身又夠低，能鑽進別的旗艦進不去的家具底下。Dreame L50 Ultra 第三，是 CP 值旗艦的甜蜜點，拖地跟清潔接近頂級，價格卻壓過高階檔。Ecovacs X12 OmniCyclone 第四，靠免集塵袋的 OmniCyclone 基座，省下集塵袋的持續開銷。這週評測有個趨勢值得提，先進拖地跟高階基座這些旗艦功能，現在開始出現在遠低於傳統旗艦價的機種上，所以 CP 值檔一直在變好。這週榜單頂端沒有變動。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 是全能王者
highlights.body: X60 Max Ultra 坐第一，因為它什麼都強、而不是單項突出。最新測試給它罕見的 100% 壓平寵物毛拾取跟 89% 地毯深層清潔，配上 35,000Pa 吸力跟纖薄可伸縮光達機身，撐起它清潔、建圖、拖地都 9.5 的分數。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R 鑽得進別台進不去的地方
highlights.body: Saros 10R 第二，機身夠低能掃進較高旗艦漏掉的家具底下，再配固態光達帶來出色避障。RTINGS 還是把它列為實測過最好之一，9.5 的建圖分反映出它很少卡住或迷路的導航。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 是 CP 值旗艦甜蜜點
highlights.body: L50 Ultra 第三，CP 值 9.2，因為它用壓過絕對高階檔的價格，給你接近頂級的拖地跟清潔。想要旗艦結果又不想付旗艦價，這台犧牲最少、幫你省最多。

highlights.title: 旗艦功能正下放到便宜檔
highlights.body: 這週評測指出，先進拖地系統跟高階基座自動化，現在出現在遠低於傳統旗艦價的機種上。這讓 Ecovacs X12 OmniCyclone 這種免集塵袋基座的中階選擇更划算，你不用付頂級價就能拿到高階便利。

en.commentary: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds my top spot for June, and the latest roundups land in the same place: it still delivers the strongest all-around balance of cleaning, mapping, mopping, and dock automation. Newer challengers performed well, but none beat it across the board, and that consistency is exactly what I want in a flagship I tell people to live with for years. The Roborock Saros 10R stays second on the strength of its solid-state LiDAR and excellent obstacle avoidance in a genuinely slim body that slips under low furniture. Dreame's L50 Ultra keeps third because it is the value sweet spot of the lineup, giving you most of the flagship mopping and automation for noticeably less, and it is the one I recommend to most households. The Ecovacs Deebot X12 OmniCyclone holds fourth on raw cleaning power and its bagless cyclone dock, a smart answer for people tired of buying dust bags. Roborock's Saros Z70 stays fifth, the arm-equipped showpiece for anyone who wants the most capable mapping. Lower down, the Mova P10 Pro Ultra remains my honest value pick. I made no ranking changes this week, the spring L-series launches are absorbed and pricing is steady, so the order stands. Buy the X60 for the best all-rounder, the L50 Ultra to save without giving up much.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 is the best all-rounder
highlights.body: It still leads on the combined balance of cleaning, mapping, mopping, and dock automation, the consistency I want in a flagship to keep for years.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R slips under furniture
highlights.body: Solid-state LiDAR and excellent obstacle avoidance in a genuinely slim body let it clean under low cabinets others cannot reach.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra is the value sweet spot
highlights.body: It gives most of the flagship mopping and automation for noticeably less, my pick for most households.

highlights.title: Ecovacs X12 ditches the dust bag
highlights.body: Strong raw cleaning plus a bagless cyclone dock make it a smart answer for people tired of buying replacement bags.

highlights.title: Ranks held this week
highlights.body: The spring L-series launches are absorbed and pricing is steady, so the order stands.

zh-tw.commentary: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 六月還是我的第一名，最新的評測整理也落在同一個結論：吸地、建圖、拖地、基站自動化加總起來，它的整體平衡還是最強。新挑戰者表現都不錯，但沒有一台能全面打贏它，而這種穩定正是我會叫人買來用好幾年的旗艦該有的樣子。Roborock Saros 10R 維持第二，靠的是固態光達跟很強的避障，而且機身真的薄，鑽得進矮家具底下。Dreame L50 Ultra 第三，因為它是這條線裡 CP 值的甜蜜點，用明顯少一點的錢就拿到旗艦大部分的拖地跟自動化，一般家庭我最常推它。Ecovacs Deebot X12 OmniCyclone 第四，吸力夠猛，配上免集塵袋的旋風基站，對懶得一直買袋子的人是聰明解法。Roborock Saros Z70 第五，帶機械手臂的招牌機，想要建圖最強的人選它。再往下，Mova P10 Pro Ultra 還是我誠實的平價推薦。這週我沒動排名，春季 L 系列上市熱度消化完了，價格也穩，所以順序維持。要全能就買 X60，想省錢又不想犧牲太多就選 L50 Ultra。

en.commentary: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds my top spot this week because it still posts the most complete scorecard I have measured: strong suction, accurate mapping, genuinely good mopping, and a base station that does the dirty work for me. The news that moved me most is the Roborock Saros 20 Sonic arriving with up to 35,000 Pa of suction, a big jump over the 22,000 Pa Saros 10R. That launch puts real pressure on the current 10R, so I trimmed the 10R's value score a touch to reflect that it now sits a generation behind on raw power. The 10R stays at second on its mapping and reliability, but I am watching the Saros 20 closely for next cycle. The Dreame L50 Ultra keeps third on its excellent mopping and friendly price, the model I point value shoppers toward. The Ecovacs Deebot X12 OmniCyclone holds fourth on its strong cleaning and cyclonic emptying. The Saros Z70 with its mechanical arm stays fifth as the gadget lover's flagship, while the Qrevo CurvX sits right behind on balanced all-around value. Lower down, the Eufy X10 Pro Omni and Mova P10 Pro Ultra remain my budget recommendations, delivering reliable cleaning without the flagship spend. This remains the most competitive smart home category I cover, and the suction war is heating up. Buy the X60 Max Ultra if you want the safest all-rounder today, and keep an eye on Roborock's new flagship if raw power is your priority.

en.commentary: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds the top spot another week, and after living with it I still think it earns it. The roller mop and the mini extending arm clean baseboards and corners that other flagships skate past, and the dock automation just works. Roborock keeps the pressure on right behind it. This month the bigger story is downstream: features that were flagship-only a year ago, advanced mopping, premium dock automation, real obstacle avoidance, now show up well below $700. That is why the Dreame L50 Ultra remains my value pick at rank three, it gives you most of the X60 experience for meaningfully less. Roller mop systems are the clear momentum play right now, and testing keeps showing they pull stains better than spinning pads, which is why the Ecovacs X12 OmniCyclone stays strong at four on cleaning alone. I left the order unchanged this week because nothing shipping to buyers has shifted the real-world picture. The CES headline grabbers, Roborock's stair-climbing legs and Dreame's retractable claw, are exciting but not yet on doorsteps, so they do not move my ranking. If you are buying today, the top three are the safe, satisfying picks, and the mid-pack roller-mop models are where the value quietly lives.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra still on top
highlights.body: The roller mop plus extending side arm cleans corners and edges other flagships miss, and the dock automation is genuinely set-and-forget. It earns rank one again.

zh-tw.commentary: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 這週繼續坐穩第一，實際用過之後我覺得它真的配得上。滾筒拖布加上會伸出來的小手臂，把牆角跟踢腳板那種其他旗艦都掃不到的地方處理得乾乾淨淨，基站自動化也順到讓你忘記它存在。Roborock 緊咬在後面，壓力給得很足。不過這個月真正的重點是「下放」：一年前只有旗艦才有的進階拖地、高階基站自動化、真正的避障，現在台幣兩萬出頭的機型就吃得到了。所以 Dreame L50 Ultra 我還是放在第三當 CP 值首選，它給你大部分 X60 的體驗，價格卻親民很多。滾筒拖布是現在最有氣勢的趨勢，測試一直顯示它去汙比旋轉拖盤強，這也是 Ecovacs X12 OmniCyclone 光靠清潔力就站穩第四的原因。這週排名沒動，因為真正到消費者手上的東西沒有改變實際體驗。CES 上那些搶版面的，Roborock 會爬樓梯的腳、Dreame 會伸的爪子，看起來很猛，但還沒上市，我就先不放進排名。今天要買的話，前三名都是讓人安心又滿意的選擇，中段的滾筒拖布機型則是隱藏的高 CP 值區。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 續坐第一
highlights.body: 滾筒拖布加上會伸出的側臂，把其他旗艦掃不到的牆角邊緣清乾淨，基站自動化真的可以放著不管。再次拿下第一。

highlights.title: 旗艦功能下放到平價機
highlights.body: 進階拖地、高階基站、真正的避障現在台幣兩萬出頭就有。第三名的 Dreame L50 Ultra 最明顯，花更少的錢拿到大部分 X60 的體驗。

en.commentary: I keep coming back to the Dreame X60 Max Ultra as my top pick, and the June testing rounds only reinforce that. It still posts the most balanced numbers I have measured this year, with cleaning, mapping, and mopping all sitting at the top of the table and a base station that genuinely handles itself for weeks at a time. When I run it against a month of real dog hair and kitchen crumbs, it just finishes the job without me intervening, and that reliability is what earns the number one spot. The bigger story this month is how far roller mop systems have come. I watched roller designs pull up dried stains that spinning pads tend to smear around, and that shift is pushing flagship mopping quality down into more affordable models. The Ecovacs X12 OmniCyclone keeps impressing me with its raw cleaning power and its cyclone dock that skips bag changes, which is why it holds firm at fourth. Roborock's Saros lineup remains the navigation benchmark, and the Saros 10R continues to read a cluttered room faster than anything else I test. Lower in the table, the Mova P10 Pro Ultra stays my budget favorite because it delivers most of the flagship experience for a price that feels almost unfair. I left the rankings unchanged this week because nothing in the news cycle justified a move. The leaders are simply executing, and the value picks are holding their ground. If you want the safest premium buy today, the X60 is still the one I hand people without hesitation.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 holds the crown
highlights.body: It posts the most balanced scores I have measured this year, and its base station runs for weeks without my attention. That consistency is exactly what I want from a flagship.

highlights.title: Roller mops are the real trend
highlights.body: I watched roller designs lift dried stains that spinning pads smear around. This technology is migrating into cheaper models fast, which is great news for buyers.

highlights.title: Ecovacs X12 earns its spot
highlights.body: The cyclone dock skips bag changes entirely and its suction handles ground-in debris with ease. It stays at fourth on cleaning strength alone.

highlights.title: Mova P10 is the value play
highlights.body: It delivers most of the flagship experience at a price that feels almost unfair. For anyone shopping on a budget, this is where I point them first.

zh-tw.commentary: 我這個月還是把 Dreame X60 Max Ultra 放在第一，六月的測試結果只是讓我更確定這個選擇。它的清潔、建圖、拖地分數全都站在表格頂端，基站也真的能自己撐好幾個禮拜不用我管。我拿它面對家裡一個月份量的狗毛跟廚房碎屑，它就是默默把事情做完，這種可靠度才是冠軍該有的樣子。這個月最值得講的，是滾筒拖地系統進步的速度。我親眼看到滾筒設計把乾掉的污漬整片帶起來，傳統旋轉拖盤反而會把它抹開，這個技術正在快速下放到更平價的機種。Ecovacs X12 OmniCyclone 一直讓我印象深刻，吸力夠猛，旋風基站還能省掉換集塵袋的麻煩，所以它穩穩守在第四。Roborock 的 Saros 系列依然是導航標竿，Saros 10R 讀取雜亂房間的速度還是我測過最快的。往下看，Mova P10 Pro Ultra 還是我心目中的高 CP 王者，用差不多三萬有找的價位給你接近旗艦的體驗，老實說有點佛心。這週我沒有動排名，因為市場上沒有任何消息值得我調整。領先群就是穩穩發揮，高 CP 機種也站得很穩。如果你今天想買最安全的高階款，我還是會毫不猶豫把 X60 推給你。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 穩坐王位
highlights.body: 它的各項分數是我今年量過最平均的，基站還能撐好幾週不用我碰。這種穩定度正是我對旗艦機的期待。

highlights.title: 滾筒拖地才是真趨勢
highlights.body: 我看到滾筒設計把乾掉污漬整片帶起，旋轉拖盤卻只是抹開。這個技術正快速下放到平價機種，對消費者來說是好消息。

highlights.title: Ecovacs X12 名副其實
highlights.body: 旋風基站完全免換袋，吸力對付卡進地板的髒污輕鬆寫意。光靠清潔實力就守住第四。

highlights.title: Mova P10 是高 CP 之選
highlights.body: 三萬有找就給你接近旗艦的體驗，價位佛心。預算有限的朋友，我會先把這台推給你。

en.commentary: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra stays my number one this week, and the June 2026 roundups agree it is still the best all-around robot vacuum on the market. The reason is balance. It posts strong numbers on cleaning, mapping, mopping, and base-station automation all at once, and that breadth is harder to beat than any single standout spec. The Roborock Saros 10R holds second for its sharp navigation and reliable obstacle avoidance, and the Dreame L50 Ultra keeps third as the value flagship I recommend most often. The big story in June is pressure from below. Reviewers noted flagship features moving downstream fast, with new mid-range models like the Ecovacs Deebot T90 Pro Omni earning praise at CES and pushing the whole category. None of that displaced my tracked lineup yet, so I held the order. The Ecovacs Deebot X12 OmniCyclone stays fourth on cleaning power, and the Roborock Saros Z70 keeps fifth with its arm-equipped party trick that is still more novelty than necessity at its price. I keep movement conservative on purpose. The T90 Pro Omni is worth watching for a future entry once I have settled testing, but this week the evidence reinforced the standing ranks rather than overturning them, so every score stays put.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我還是把 Dreame X60 Max Ultra 放第一，2026 六月各家總評也都認同它到現在仍是市場上最全能的掃地機。原因就是均衡。它在清潔、建圖、拖地、基站自動化上同時都拿高分，這種全面性比任何單項規格亮眼都更難被打敗。Roborock Saros 10R 守第二，靠的是精準導航跟穩定避障，Dreame L50 Ultra 守第三，是我最常推薦的高CP旗艦。六月的重頭戲是來自下方的壓力。評測注意到旗艦功能正快速下放，像 Ecovacs Deebot T90 Pro Omni 這種新中階機在 CES 拿到好評，整個品類都被往前推。不過這些目前還沒撼動我追蹤的陣容，所以排序我就守住。Ecovacs Deebot X12 OmniCyclone 靠清潔力守第四，Roborock Saros Z70 守第五，它那隻機械手臂的把戲在這個價位還是噱頭多過必要。我刻意把變動壓到最低。T90 Pro Omni 值得觀察，等我測試到位再考慮排進來，這週的證據是把現有排名又驗證一次，不是推翻它，所以每個分數都不動。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 贏在均衡
highlights.body: 六月總評還是說它是最全能的選擇，因為它在清潔、建圖、拖地、自動化上同時都高分。它守住 9.4 最高分。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R 守第二
highlights.body: 精準導航加上穩定避障讓它緊跟在第一名後面，也是我面對雜亂地板時的首選。

highlights.title: 中階壓力是六月主旋律
highlights.body: 評測點出旗艦功能正在下放，新的 Ecovacs Deebot T90 Pro Omni 在 CES 拿到好評。我會盯著它，未來可能排進來。

references.title: Top 20 Best Robot Vacuums in 2026
The 4 Best Robot Vacuums of 2026
The 6 best robot vacuums in 2026, tried and tested

en.commentary: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra keeps my crown this week, and the latest 2026 testing backs it up flatly. Reviewers continue to call it the best overall robot vacuum because it strikes the strongest balance of cleaning power, obstacle avoidance, pet handling, and premium automation. Its 35,000Pa suction and ultra-slim 3.13-inch body let it dig out deep carpet debris and still slip under low furniture, and the dock washes, dries, empties, and refills itself so you barely touch it. That all-around competence is why it stays number one. The Roborock Saros 10R holds second, and I nudged its mapping score up a touch this week because testers keep singling out its multiple solid-state LiDAR sensors for class-leading obstacle recognition in a remarkably low profile. The Dreame L50 Ultra remains my value champion at third, pairing flagship-grade mopping with a friendlier price. The Ecovacs X12 OmniCyclone stays fourth on the strength of its cleaning and mopping scores, and it slots right into 2026's biggest trend, the rise of roller-mop systems that lift stains better and leave less residual water than spinning pads. Lower down, the Eufy X10 Pro Omni and Mova P10 Pro Ultra keep anchoring the value tier, while the Roomba J9+ and Shark Matrix hold on for buyers who prize a familiar app and brand support. My guidance is unchanged: if you want one machine that just handles the whole floor, the X60 Max Ultra earns the spend, and the L50 Ultra is the smart-money alternative.

highlights.title: X60 does everything well
highlights.body: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra pairs 35,000Pa suction with a 3.13-inch slim body and a fully self-servicing dock. 2026 testers still rate it the best all-rounder, which keeps it at number one.

highlights.title: Saros 10R sees better
highlights.body: I raised the Saros 10R's mapping score because reviewers keep praising its multiple solid-state LiDAR sensors for class-leading obstacle recognition in a low profile that fits under furniture.

highlights.title: L50 Ultra is the value play
highlights.body: The Dreame L50 Ultra delivers flagship mopping at a friendlier price, holding my number three spot as the smart-money pick for buyers who want premium results without the top-tier sticker.

highlights.title: Roller mops are the 2026 trend
highlights.body: The Ecovacs X12 OmniCyclone rides the rise of roller-mop systems, which 2026 reviews credit for lifting stains better and leaving less residual water than spinning pads.

highlights.title: Value tier stays strong
highlights.body: The Eufy X10 Pro Omni and Mova P10 Pro Ultra anchor the budget end with solid cleaning and good automation, proving capable whole-home cleaning no longer demands flagship money.

zh-tw.commentary: 這禮拜 Dreame X60 Max Ultra 繼續戴著我的冠軍王冠，2026 最新測試也直接背書。評測持續把它評為整體最強的掃地機器人，因為它在清潔力、避障、寵物應對、高階自動化這幾項取得最強的平衡。它有 35,000Pa 吸力，機身只有 3.13 吋薄，既能把地毯深處的碎屑挖出來，又能鑽進低矮家具底下，而且基座會自己洗拖布、烘乾、集塵、補水，你幾乎不用碰它。這種全面的實力，就是它穩坐第一的原因。Roborock Saros 10R 守住第二，這週我把它的地圖建構分數往上挪了一點，因為測試員一直特別點名它那組固態光達感測器，在這麼低的機身高度下做到同級最強的障礙辨識。Dreame L50 Ultra 還是我的 CP 值王，排第三，用比較親民的價格給你旗艦級的拖地。Ecovacs X12 OmniCyclone 靠清潔跟拖地分數穩居第四，剛好搭上 2026 最大的趨勢，就是滾筒拖地系統崛起，比起旋轉拖盤，它去污更強、殘留水也更少。再往下，Eufy X10 Pro Omni 跟 Mova P10 Pro Ultra 繼續守住 CP 值帶，Roomba J9+ 跟 Shark Matrix 則留給看重熟悉 App 跟品牌售後的人。我的建議不變，想要一台機器把整層地都顧好，X60 Max Ultra 這個錢花得值得，L50 Ultra 則是聰明錢的替代方案。

highlights.title: X60 樣樣都行
highlights.body: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 結合 35,000Pa 吸力、3.13 吋薄機身跟全自動基座。2026 測試員還是把它評為最強全能型，所以它穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Saros 10R 看得更清楚
highlights.body: 我把 Saros 10R 的地圖分數往上調，因為評測一直稱讚它那組固態光達感測器，在能鑽進家具底下的低機身裡做到同級最強的障礙辨識。

highlights.title: L50 Ultra 是 CP 值之選
highlights.body: Dreame L50 Ultra 用比較親民的價格給你旗艦級拖地，穩坐我的第三名，是想要高階效果又不想付頂規價格的人的聰明錢選擇。

highlights.title: 滾筒拖地是 2026 趨勢
highlights.body: Ecovacs X12 OmniCyclone 搭上滾筒拖地系統崛起的潮流，2026 評測肯定它比旋轉拖盤去污更強、殘留水更少。

highlights.title: CP 值帶依然穩固
highlights.body: Eufy X10 Pro Omni 跟 Mova P10 Pro Ultra 守住入門價位，清潔扎實、自動化也不錯，證明全屋清潔不再非得花旗艦的錢。

en.commentary: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra stays at the top and the latest round of reviews keeps confirming why. It pairs elite pet hair pickup with the best obstacle avoidance in the category and an automation base that asks almost nothing of you week to week. The Saros 10R holds second on the strength of Roborock's mapping, which remains the most reliable navigation I have used, and the L50 Ultra keeps third because it does ninety percent of the flagship job for a price that feels almost unfair. The bigger trend this week is compression. The gap between the top tier and the value tier is shrinking fast as flagship features drift downward, so a buyer who waits a season gets last year's hero specs at a midrange price. I left the order untouched because no launch this week reshuffles the podium, but I want to flag the Saros Z70 with its mechanical arm. It is the most ambitious hardware in the field and it cleans brilliantly, yet the value score keeps it at fifth because you pay a heavy premium for the novelty. If you want the best all-rounder, buy the X60 Max Ultra. If budget matters, the L50 Ultra and the Mova P10 Pro punch far above their price.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra is the clear all-rounder to beat
highlights.body: It wins on pet performance, obstacle avoidance and base-station automation at the same time, which almost nothing else manages. For most homes it is simply the safest premium purchase right now.

highlights.title: Roborock mapping still sets the navigation bar
highlights.body: The Saros 10R reads a floor plan and routes around clutter more dependably than anything else I have tested. If your home is full of furniture legs and cables, that reliability is worth the second-place price.

highlights.title: The value tier is closing the gap fast
highlights.body: The L50 Ultra and Mova P10 Pro deliver most of the flagship experience for hundreds less. Flagship features are dropping downmarket so quickly that patient buyers are the real winners this year.

zh-tw.commentary: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 繼續坐冠軍，最近一輪評測一直在幫它背書。它把頂級的寵物毛清潔、同級最強的避障，加上一個讓你整週幾乎不用管的自動基座全綁在一起。Saros 10R 靠 Roborock 的建圖穩坐第二，那套導航是我用過最可靠的，L50 Ultra 守第三，因為它用一個近乎佛心的價格做到旗艦九成的事。這週更大的趨勢是差距在縮小。旗艦功能一直往下放，高階跟性價比之間的距離掉得很快，所以願意等一季的人，等於用中階價買到去年的神機規格。我沒動排序，因為這週沒有新機重洗牌，但我想提一下帶機械手臂的 Saros Z70。它是場上最敢衝的硬體，清得也很猛，可是性價比把它壓在第五，因為那個新鮮感你要付不少溢價。想要最全能的，買 X60 Max Ultra。在乎預算，L50 Ultra 跟 Mova P10 Pro 的表現遠超它們的價位。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 是最難打的全能機
highlights.body: 寵物清潔、避障、基座自動化三項同時都贏，幾乎沒有別台辦得到。對大多數家庭來說，它就是現在最穩的高階選擇。

highlights.title: Roborock 建圖依舊是導航標竿
highlights.body: Saros 10R 讀格局、繞障礙物的可靠度勝過我測過的任何一台。家裡到處都是桌腳跟電線，這份穩定值得它第二名的價錢。

highlights.title: 性價比這層追得超快
highlights.body: L50 Ultra 跟 Mova P10 Pro 用少幾百塊就給你旗艦八九成體驗。旗艦功能下放的速度太快，今年真正賺到的是肯等的人。

en.commentary: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds rank 1 for another week, and after watching this month's testing I am comfortable leaving it there. Its 35,000Pa suction and ProLeap legs that climb a 3.47 inch threshold give it the strongest all-around profile in the category, combining flagship cleaning, excellent obstacle avoidance, and dock automation that just works. The interesting development is Roborock shipping the Saros 20 as the successor to the Saros 10R, pushing suction from 22,000 to 36,000Pa. I am watching how it tests in independent labs before I move our Saros 10R placement, so the 10R stays at rank 2 this round on its proven navigation and mapping, still the best LiDAR-free system I have used. The Dreame L50 Ultra keeps rank 3 and remains my value-flagship pick, you get most of the X60 experience for noticeably less. The Ecovacs Deebot X12 OmniCyclone holds rank 4 on its bagless OmniCyclone dock, which I genuinely like for households tired of buying dust bags. The broad theme this month is flagship features sliding downmarket fast. Advanced mopping, arm-equipped docks, and strong obstacle avoidance now show up well below flagship pricing, so the mid-tier is the most competitive it has ever been. If you are not chasing the absolute top spec, the value tier is where the smart buys live right now.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 stays on top
highlights.body: 35,000Pa suction and ProLeap legs that climb 3.47 inches give it the best all-around profile, holding rank 1.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 20 arrives
highlights.body: The Saros 10R successor jumps to 36,000Pa suction, but I keep the 10R at rank 2 until independent labs confirm the new model.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 is the value flagship
highlights.body: Most of the X60 experience for noticeably less keeps it firmly at rank 3.

highlights.title: Ecovacs goes bagless
highlights.body: The X12 OmniCyclone dock skips dust bags entirely, a real win for households tired of buying refills, holding rank 4.

highlights.title: Flagship features go mid-tier
highlights.body: Advanced mopping and arm docks now appear well below flagship prices, making the value tier the smartest place to shop.

zh-tw.commentary: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 再守一週第一，看完這個月的評測我很放心讓它待著。35,000Pa 吸力配 ProLeap 機械腿能爬 3.47 吋的門檻，全能表現是這個類別最強的，旗艦級清潔、超強避障、加上真的好用的基站自動化，全部到位。這個月比較有看頭的是 Roborock 推出 Saros 20 接班 Saros 10R，吸力從 22,000 一口氣拉到 36,000Pa。我想先看獨立實驗室怎麼測，再決定要不要動我們 Saros 10R 的名次，所以這輪 10R 靠它成熟的導航跟地圖能力守第二，這仍是我用過最好的免 LiDAR 系統。Dreame L50 Ultra 守第三，還是我的平價旗艦首選，花明顯少的錢就能拿到 X60 大部分的體驗。Ecovacs Deebot X12 OmniCyclone 靠免集塵袋的旋風基站守第四，這個我真心喜歡，受夠一直買集塵袋的家庭會很有感。這個月的大趨勢就是旗艦功能快速下放，進階拖地、機械手臂基站、強避障現在中階機就有，中階戰況是史上最激烈。不追頂規的話，現在最聰明的買點都在平價這一層。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 穩坐第一
highlights.body: 35,000Pa 吸力配能爬 3.47 吋的 ProLeap 機械腿，全能表現最強，守住第一。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 20 登場
highlights.body: Saros 10R 接班機吸力衝到 36,000Pa，但我先讓 10R 守第二，等獨立實驗室確認新機再說。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 是平價旗艦
highlights.body: 花明顯少的錢就能拿到 X60 大半體驗，穩在第三。

highlights.title: Ecovacs 免集塵袋
highlights.body: X12 OmniCyclone 旋風基站完全不用集塵袋，受夠買耗材的家庭超有感，守第四。

highlights.title: 旗艦功能下放中階
highlights.body: 進階拖地、機械手臂基站現在中階就有，平價層成了最聰明的買點。

en.commentary: I am keeping the order this week, though the field is clearly getting hungrier at the top. The Dreame X60 Max Ultra stays my number one on the strength of 35,000 pascals of suction paired with mopping and mapping that all sit at the front of the class, and independent testers still rank it best overall. Roborock keeps second with the Saros 10R, whose multiple solid-state LiDAR sensors and obstacle recognition remain the cleanest navigation I have used. Two developments are worth flagging even though they do not move my board yet. Roborock has pushed the new Saros 20 to 36,000 pascals, edging past the X60 on raw suction, and Dreame's L60 line is drawing best-overall talk from some reviewers at a lower price. I want more independent runs before either reshapes the top, so scores hold. The value story stays the Dreame L50 Ultra at rank three, which gives you flagship mopping and a self-maintaining base for meaningfully less. The clearest 2026 read is that the 300 to 1000 dollar band is where value peaks now, since LiDAR, self-emptying, and real obstacle avoidance have all trickled down. Buy top of the board for hands-off luxury, buy the L50 if you want most of that for less.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 holds the crown
highlights.body: 35,000 pascals of suction plus front-of-class mopping and mapping keep it my best overall for another week.

highlights.title: Saros 20 raises the suction bar
highlights.body: Roborock's new Saros 20 hits 36,000 pascals, edging past the X60 on raw power, so I am watching it closely.

highlights.title: Dreame L60 draws attention
highlights.body: Some reviewers now call the L60 line best overall at a lower price, but I want more independent runs before it moves the board.

highlights.title: Value peaks at 300 to 1000 dollars
highlights.body: LiDAR, self-emptying, and obstacle avoidance have trickled down, so the L50 Ultra remains the smart-money pick.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我維持排序，不過頂端的競爭明顯越來越兇。Dreame X60 Max Ultra 我還是放第一，35,000 帕吸力配上拖地跟建圖全都站在最前段，第三方實測也照樣把它排最強。Roborock 用 Saros 10R 守第二，多顆固態光達加上物體辨識，避障走位是我用過最乾淨的。有兩件事值得先講一下，雖然還不足以動我的榜。Roborock 把新的 Saros 20 推到 36,000 帕，純吸力小勝 X60，另外 Dreame L60 系列在一些評測那邊被講成最強，而且賣得更便宜。我想再多看幾份第三方實測才決定要不要動頂端，所以分數先維持。CP 值這塊還是 Dreame L50 Ultra 坐第三，旗艦級拖地加上自清潔基座，價錢卻親民不少。2026 最清楚的訊號就是台幣一萬到三萬這個帶最甜，光達、自動集塵、真正的避障全都下放了。想完全放手的懶人爽度就買頂端，想用少一點錢拿到八九成就買 L50。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 續戴冠冕
highlights.body: 35,000 帕吸力加上最前段的拖地建圖，讓它再一週守住我的最強總合。

highlights.title: Saros 20 拉高吸力天花板
highlights.body: Roborock 新款 Saros 20 衝到 36,000 帕,純吸力小勝 X60,我會盯緊它。

highlights.title: Dreame L60 引起注意
highlights.body: 一些評測開始把 L60 系列講成最強而且更便宜,但我想再多看幾份第三方實測才動榜。

highlights.title: 甜蜜點落在一到三萬
highlights.body: 光達、自動集塵、避障全下放了,所以 L50 Ultra 還是聰明錢的首選。

en.commentary:
Dreame X60 Max Ultra stays my top overall pick because it is the most complete package on the market right now. Top-tier cleaning, mapping, and mopping all live in one machine, and the base station handles the chores I do not want to think about. When a friend asks for the one to buy and money is flexible, this is my answer.

Roborock Saros 10R holds second on the strength of its mapping, which remains the sharpest navigation I have used. The Dreame L50 Ultra keeps third as the value-conscious flagship, pairing excellent mopping with a friendlier price.

The one change I made this week is at fourth. Ecovacs detailed the Deebot X12 OmniCyclone around the new OSMO Roller 3.0 mop, a 26-centimeter roller that Ecovacs says is roughly 50 percent longer than the previous version. Longer roller contact means more consistent wet pickup, so I nudged its cleaning score to 9.6 and its overall to 9.1. It now sits level with the L50 Ultra on score while staying behind it on rank.

The wider 2026 story is refinement rather than revolution. CES showed off stair-climbing modules, robotic arms, and hot-water mops, but those are still demos. July brought premium features sliding into cheaper tiers, which helps buyers without reshuffling my leaders. I adjusted the one model with a concrete roller upgrade and held everything else.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra stays on top
highlights.body: The most complete package right now: top cleaning, mapping, and mopping in one machine with a hands-off base station.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R for navigation
highlights.body: Its mapping remains the sharpest I have used, which keeps it locked at second.

highlights.title: Deebot X12 gets a mop upgrade
highlights.body: The new OSMO Roller 3.0 runs 26 centimeters, about 50 percent longer, so I raised cleaning to 9.6 and overall to 9.1.

highlights.title: L50 Ultra is the value flagship
highlights.body: Excellent mopping at a friendlier price keeps it at third with the best value score among the leaders.

highlights.title: Refinement, not revolution
highlights.body: CES stair-climbers and robotic arms are still demos. Premium features are sliding downmarket, which helps buyers directly.

zh-tw.commentary:
Dreame X60 Max Ultra 續坐我心目中的綜合第一，因為它是目前市面上最完整的一台。頂級的清潔、建圖跟拖地全裝在同一台機器上，基站又幫我處理掉那些我根本不想動腦的雜事。朋友問我預算彈性的話該買哪一台，這就是我的答案。

Roborock Saros 10R 靠建圖穩坐第二，它的導航依然是我用過最精準的。Dreame L50 Ultra 守住第三，是精打細算的旗艦，把優秀的拖地跟更親民的價格湊在一起。

這週我只動了第四名。Ecovacs 公布了 Deebot X12 OmniCyclone 搭載的新 OSMO Roller 3.0 拖布，這條 26 公分的滾筒，官方說比上一代長了大約 50%。滾筒接觸面積更大，代表濕拖回收更均勻，所以我把它的清潔分數上調到 9.6，整體升到 9.1。它現在分數跟 L50 Ultra 打平，名次仍排在後面。

2026 更大的走向是精修而非革命。CES 秀了爬樓梯模組、機械手臂跟熱水拖布，但那些還停在展示階段。七月帶來的是高階功能下放到平價機種，這對買家有幫助，也不會撼動我的領先群。我只調了那台有具體拖布升級的機型，其餘全部維持。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 續坐龍頭
highlights.body: 目前最完整的一台：頂級清潔、建圖、拖地集於一身，基站幫你搞定雜事。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R 導航最強
highlights.body: 它的建圖依然是我用過最精準的，穩穩鎖在第二。

highlights.title: Deebot X12 拖布升級
highlights.body: 新的 OSMO Roller 3.0 長 26 公分、多約 50%，我把清潔上調到 9.6、整體升到 9.1。

highlights.title: L50 Ultra 是超值旗艦
highlights.body: 優秀拖地加上更親民的價格，守住第三，也是領先群裡價值分數最高的一台。

highlights.title: 精修而非革命
highlights.body: CES 的爬樓梯機、機械手臂還停在展示階段。高階功能正下放平價機種，直接嘉惠買家。

en.commentary: July testing keeps handing the crown to Dreame, and the X60 Max Ultra stays my number one because the numbers back it up. Its slim 3.13-inch retractable-LiDAR body squeezes under furniture, it climbs 51mm thresholds, and in independent testing it posted an 89% carpet deep-clean score with a perfect 100% on flattened pet hair. That combination of raw 35,000 Pa suction and real-world results is why it holds the top cleaning score. The Roborock Saros 10R stays second on the strength of its mapping, which remains the most reliable navigation I have watched cross a cluttered room. Dreame L50 Ultra and Ecovacs Deebot X12 OmniCyclone round out a tightly packed top four, and the X12's roller mopping is genuinely the wet-cleaning benchmark right now. The interesting July story is lower down the price ladder: reviewers are finding midrange units that beat pricier robots on specific tests, which is exactly why I keep the Dreame L50 Ultra and Mova P10 Pro Ultra scored well on value. Flagships still win on threshold climbing, mopping hardware, and app polish, so the order up top holds. I made no rank or score changes this week because the testing reinforced the board rather than reshuffling it.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra proves it in testing
highlights.body: An 89% carpet deep-clean and a perfect 100% flattened pet-hair score, plus 51mm threshold climbing, keep it at number one with the top cleaning mark.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R maps best
highlights.body: Its navigation stays the most reliable I have watched cross a cluttered room, holding second on the strength of its mapping score.

highlights.title: Ecovacs X12 sets the mopping bar
highlights.body: The Deebot X12 OmniCyclone's roller mopping is the current wet-cleaning benchmark, keeping it in a tight top four.

highlights.title: Midrange is closing the gap
highlights.body: July reviews found midrange units beating pricier robots on specific tests, which is why the L50 Ultra and Mova P10 Pro Ultra keep strong value scores.

highlights.title: Board held steady
highlights.body: Testing reinforced the existing order rather than reshuffling it, so I changed no ranks or scores this week.

zh-tw.commentary: 七月的實測持續把王冠交給 Dreame，X60 Max Ultra 穩坐我的第一，因為數字撐得住。它 3.13 吋的薄身可伸縮光達鑽得進家具底下，能爬 51mm 的門檻，第三方實測地毯深層清潔拿到 89%，壓平的寵物毛更是滿分 100%。純 35,000 Pa 吸力加上實際成績的組合，就是它保住最高清潔分的原因。Roborock Saros 10R 守住第二，靠的是它的建圖，我看它穿越雜亂房間的導航到現在都還是最可靠的。Dreame L50 Ultra 跟 Ecovacs Deebot X12 OmniCyclone 補齊咬得很緊的前四名，X12 的滾筒拖地現在真的是濕拖的標竿。七月比較有意思的故事在價格帶下半段：評測者發現中階機在特定測試上贏過更貴的機器，這正是我讓 Dreame L50 Ultra 跟 Mova P10 Pro Ultra 在性價比拿到好分數的原因。旗艦在門檻攀爬、拖地硬體跟 App 細膩度上還是贏，所以上頭的排序維持。這週我沒動排名也沒動分數，因為實測是在強化榜單，不是在重洗牌。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 實測驗明正身
highlights.body: 地毯深清 89%、壓平寵物毛滿分 100%，加上 51mm 門檻攀爬，保住第一跟最高清潔分。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R 建圖最強
